      <!DOCTYPE html>
      <html lang="en">
      <head>
      <meta charset="UTF-8">
      <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
      <title>Scaling Minds — Client Portal</title>
      <meta name="theme-color" content="#1B4332">
      <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
      <link rel="manifest" href="manifest.json">
      <link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="icon-192.png">
      <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Serif+Display&family=DM+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
      <style>
      :root{--green:#1B4332;--green-light:#2D6A4F;--green-muted:#40916C;--gold:#B8860B;--gold-light:#D4A017;--cream:#D4C5A9;--cream-light:#F5F0E8;--cream-bg:#FAF8F4;--white:#FFFFFF;--text:#1a1a1a;--text-muted:#6b6b6b;--border:#e0dbd2;--check-green:#2D6A4F;--shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(27,67,50,0.08);--shadow-lg:0 8px 32px rgba(27,67,50,0.12);}
      *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
      body{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;background:var(--cream-bg);color:var(--text);min-height:100vh;}
      .login-screen{min-height:100vh;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:var(--green);padding:20px;}
      .login-card{background:var(--white);border-radius:20px;padding:48px 40px;text-align:center;max-width:400px;width:100%;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);}
      .login-logo{height:80px;margin-bottom:24px;}
      .login-card h1{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:28px;color:var(--green);margin-bottom:8px;}
      .login-card p{color:var(--text-muted);font-size:14px;margin-bottom:32px;line-height:1.5;}
      .google-btn{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:12px;width:100%;padding:14px 24px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;background:var(--white);font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.2s;}
      .google-btn:hover{box-shadow:var(--shadow);background:var(--cream-light);}
      .login-divider{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin:20px 0;color:var(--text-muted);font-size:12px;}
      .login-divider::before,.login-divider::after{content:'';flex:1;height:1px;background:var(--border);}
      .login-input{width:100%;padding:12px 16px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:14px;color:var(--text);outline:none;margin-bottom:10px;}
      .login-input:focus{border-color:var(--green-muted);}
      .login-btn{width:100%;padding:14px;background:var(--green);color:var(--cream-light);border:none;border-radius:12px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;}
      .login-btn:hover{background:var(--green-light);}
      .login-toggle{margin-top:14px;font-size:13px;color:var(--green);cursor:pointer;font-weight:500;}
      .login-toggle:hover{text-decoration:underline;}
      .login-error{color:#c0392b;font-size:12px;margin-bottom:10px;min-height:16px;}
      .login-footer{margin-top:24px;font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);}
      .loading-spinner{display:inline-block;width:20px;height:20px;border:3px solid var(--border);border-top-color:var(--green);border-radius:50%;animation:spin 0.8s linear infinite;}
      @keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg);}}
      .header{background:var(--green);padding:18px 28px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;}
      .sticky-top{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:100;}
      .header-left{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;}
      .header-logo{height:44px;border-radius:4px;}
      .header h1{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;color:var(--cream-light);font-size:20px;font-weight:400;}
      .header-subtitle{color:var(--cream);font-size:12px;opacity:0.7;margin-top:1px;}
      .header-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;}
      .streak-badge{background:rgba(184,134,11,0.2);border:1px solid var(--gold);color:var(--gold-light);padding:6px 14px;border-radius:24px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;}
      .mob-streak{display:none;}
      .user-avatar{width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid var(--gold);}
      .signout-btn{background:none;border:1px solid rgba(212,197,169,0.3);color:var(--cream);font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:12px;padding:6px 14px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;}
      .signout-btn:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1);}
      .nav-bar{background:var(--green);display:flex;padding:0 28px;overflow-x:auto;border-bottom:none;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);}
      .nav-tab{padding:14px 16px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--cream);cursor:pointer;border-bottom:3px solid transparent;white-space:nowrap;opacity:0.7;transition:opacity 0.2s;}
      .nav-tab:hover{color:var(--cream-light);opacity:1;}
      .nav-tab.active{color:var(--cream-light);border-bottom-color:var(--gold);opacity:1;}
      .mob-nav{display:none;}
      .mob-nav-bar{background:var(--green);padding:12px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;position:sticky;top:0;z-index:100;}
      .mob-nav-current{display:flex;align-items:center;cursor:pointer;padding:4px;}
      .mob-ham{min-width:24px;}
      .mob-nav-menu{background:var(--white);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(27,67,50,0.1);}
      .mob-nav-item{padding:14px 20px;font-size:15px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;border-bottom:1px solid var(--cream-light);}
      .mob-nav-item:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
      .mob-nav-item:hover,.mob-nav-item.mob-active{color:var(--green);background:var(--cream-light);}
      .main{max-width:860px;margin:0 auto;padding:24px 20px 60px;}
      .quote-line{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:19px;color:var(--green-muted);font-style:italic;margin-bottom:20px;padding-left:16px;border-left:3px solid var(--gold);line-height:1.5;}
      .quote-line span{font-style:normal;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted);display:block;margin-top:2px;}
      .schedule-btn{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px;padding:14px 20px;background:var(--green);color:var(--cream-light);border:none;border-radius:12px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:none;white-space:nowrap;}
      .schedule-btn:hover{background:var(--green-light);}
      .zoom-btn{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:8px 14px;background:#2D8CFF;color:white;border:none;border-radius:8px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:none;white-space:nowrap;margin-left:auto;}
      .zoom-btn:hover{background:#1a7ae6;}
      .card{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:16px 20px;margin-bottom:14px;}
      .rcard{cursor:pointer;border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid var(--border);transition:box-shadow 0.2s,transform 0.2s;background:var(--white);}
      .rcard:hover{box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(27,67,50,0.12);transform:translateY(-2px);}
      .rlink{transition:box-shadow 0.2s;}.rlink:hover{box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(27,67,50,0.08);}
      .card h3{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:16px;color:var(--green);margin-bottom:8px;}
      .card-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.8px;color:var(--green-muted);margin-bottom:5px;}
      .habits-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;}
      .habit-card{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:14px 18px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;transition:all 0.2s;cursor:pointer;}
      .habit-card:hover{box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
      .habit-card.checked{border-color:var(--check-green);background:rgba(45,106,79,0.03);}
      .habit-card.checked .hc{background:var(--check-green);border-color:var(--check-green);}
      .habit-card.checked .hc svg{opacity:1;}
      .habit-card.checked .hn{color:var(--green-muted);}
      .hc{width:28px;height:28px;min-width:28px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all 0.2s;}
      .hc svg{width:14px;height:14px;stroke:white;opacity:0;}
      .hn{font-size:14px;font-weight:600;flex:1;}
      .hd{font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:1px;}
      .hcat{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.6px;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:5px;white-space:nowrap;}
      .cat-leadership{background:#E8F5E9;color:#1B5E20;}.cat-communication{background:#FFF3E0;color:#E65100;}.cat-wellbeing{background:#E3F2FD;color:#0D47A1;}.cat-relationships{background:#F3E5F5;color:#6A1B9A;}.cat-productivity{background:#FBE9E7;color:#BF360C;}.cat-mindset{background:#E0F2F1;color:#004D40;}.cat-custom{background:var(--cream-light);color:var(--green);}
      .hact{display:flex;gap:4px;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.2s;}
      .habit-card:hover .hact{opacity:1;}
      .abtn{width:28px;height:28px;border:none;background:transparent;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:var(--text-muted);}
      .abtn:hover{background:var(--cream-light);color:var(--text);}
      .abtn.del:hover{color:#c0392b;background:#fde8e8;}
      .add-btn{width:100%;padding:12px;border:2px dashed var(--border);border-radius:10px;background:transparent;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:6px;margin-top:10px;}
      .add-btn:hover{border-color:var(--green-muted);color:var(--green);}
      .modal-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(27,67,50,0.4);backdrop-filter:blur(4px);z-index:200;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity 0.25s;}
      .modal-overlay.open{opacity:1;pointer-events:all;}
      .modal{background:var(--white);border-radius:16px;width:480px;max-width:92vw;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);transform:translateY(20px);transition:transform 0.25s;max-height:90vh;overflow-y:auto;}
      .modal-overlay.open .modal{transform:translateY(0);}
      .mh{padding:20px 22px 0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;}
      .mh h3{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:18px;color:var(--green);}
      .mx{width:32px;height:32px;border:none;background:var(--cream-light);border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;font-size:16px;color:var(--text-muted);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
      .mb{padding:18px 22px 22px;}
      .fg{margin-bottom:16px;}
      .fl{display:block;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:6px;}
      .fi,.fs,.ft{width:100%;padding:10px 12px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:13px;color:var(--text);background:var(--white);outline:none;}
      .fi:focus,.fs:focus,.ft:focus{border-color:var(--green-muted);}
      .ft{resize:vertical;min-height:60px;}
      .fa{display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;}
      .btn{padding:10px 20px;border-radius:8px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;border:none;}
      .bp{background:var(--green);color:var(--cream-light);}
      .bp:hover{background:var(--green-light);}
      .bs{background:var(--cream-light);color:var(--text);}
      .bs:hover{background:var(--cream);}
      .stats-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:12px;margin-bottom:20px;}
      .stat-card{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:18px;text-align:center;}
      .sv{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:30px;color:var(--green);}
      .sl{font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:2px;}
      .empty{text-align:center;padding:48px 20px;}
      .empty .ei{width:56px;height:56px;background:var(--cream-light);border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 16px;font-size:24px;}
      .empty h3{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:18px;color:var(--green);margin-bottom:5px;}
      .empty p{color:var(--text-muted);font-size:13px;max-width:320px;margin:0 auto;}
      .coach-compact{display:flex;gap:20px;background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:18px 22px;margin-top:14px;}
      .cs{flex:1;}.csl{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.8px;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:4px;}
      .csn{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:17px;color:var(--green);margin-bottom:1px;}
      .cst{font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:8px;}
      .cs a{display:block;font-size:12px;color:var(--green);text-decoration:none;line-height:1.8;}
      .cdiv{width:1px;background:var(--border);}
      /* Goals */
      .goal-card{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:18px 22px;margin-bottom:12px;}
      .goal-card .goal-status{display:inline-block;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:4px;}
      .gs-active{background:#E8F5E9;color:#1B5E20;}
      .gs-completed{background:rgba(184,134,11,0.15);color:var(--gold);}
      .gs-paused{background:var(--cream-light);color:var(--text-muted);}
      .gs-inactive{background:#f0f0f0;color:#999;}
      .gs-inactive{background:#f0f0f0;color:#999;}
      /* Session notes */
      .sn-card{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-left:4px solid var(--green);border-radius:0 12px 12px 0;padding:18px 22px;margin-bottom:12px;}
      .sn-date{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--green-muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px;}
      .sn-field{margin-top:10px;}
      .sn-field-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:3px;}
      /* Coach dashboard */
      .client-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(280px,1fr));gap:14px;margin-top:16px;}
      .cc{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:18px;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.2s;}
      .cc:hover{box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
      .cc.inactive{border-left:4px solid #c0392b;}
      .ca{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;margin-right:10px;border:2px solid var(--cream);}
      .ct{display:flex;align-items:center;margin-bottom:12px;}
      .cn{font-weight:700;font-size:14px;color:var(--green);}
      .ce{font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);}
      .cstats{display:flex;gap:14px;font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);}
      .csv{font-weight:700;font-size:15px;color:var(--text);display:block;}
      .itag{display:inline-block;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;background:#fde8e8;color:#c0392b;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:4px;margin-left:6px;}
      .back{background:none;border:none;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--green);cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;padding:0;margin-bottom:16px;}
      .exp{background:var(--green);color:var(--cream-light);border:none;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;padding:9px 18px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;}
      .exp:hover{background:var(--green-light);}
      .footer{text-align:center;padding:18px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);border-top:1px solid var(--border);margin-top:30px;}
      .week-grid{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;overflow-x:auto;}
      .whr{display:grid;grid-template-columns:160px repeat(7,1fr);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--cream-light);min-width:560px;}
      .whc{padding:10px 5px;text-align:center;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.4px;color:var(--text-muted);}
      .whc.tc{color:var(--green);background:rgba(45,106,79,0.08);}
      .whc:first-child{text-align:left;padding-left:16px;}
      .wr{display:grid;grid-template-columns:160px repeat(7,1fr);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);min-width:560px;}
      .wr:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
      .whn{padding:10px 16px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;display:flex;align-items:center;}
      .wc{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:6px;}
      .wc.tc{background:rgba(45,106,79,0.04);}
      .wd{width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid var(--border);cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
      .wd:hover{border-color:var(--green-muted);}
      .wd.f{background:var(--check-green);border-color:var(--check-green);}
      .wd.f svg{stroke:white;width:12px;height:12px;}
      .wd.fu{opacity:0.3;pointer-events:none;}
      @media(max-width:700px){
      .header{padding:14px 16px;display:none!important;}.header h1{font-size:18px;}.header-logo{height:36px;}
      .sticky-top{display:none!important;}
      .streak{font-size:13px;padding:6px 14px;}
      .mob-streak{display:inline-flex!important;}
      .nav-bar{display:none!important;}
      .mob-nav{display:block!important;}
      .main{padding:22px 18px 60px;max-width:100%;font-size:16px;}
      .quote-line{font-size:21px!important;line-height:1.5!important;margin-bottom:28px!important;padding-left:14px;}
      .card{padding:20px 20px;margin-bottom:18px;}
      .card h3{font-size:19px;}
      /* Home welcome - big and bold */
      .main > div:first-child > div:first-child{font-size:32px!important;}
      /* Meta line under welcome */
      .main > div:first-child > div:nth-child(2){font-size:15px!important;}
      /* Goal cards */
      .goal-card{padding:20px 20px;margin-bottom:12px;}
      .goal-card div[style*="font-size:17px"]{font-size:19px!important;}
      .goal-card div[style*="font-size:13px"]{font-size:15px!important;}
      /* Session notes */
      .sn-card{padding:20px 20px;}
      .sn-field{font-size:16px!important;}
      .sn-field-label{font-size:13px!important;}
      .sn-date{font-size:14px!important;}
      /* Habits */
      .habit-card{padding:16px 18px;}
      .hc{width:36px;height:36px;min-width:36px;}
      .hn{font-size:17px;}
      .hd{font-size:14px;}
      .habits-list{gap:10px;}
      /* Week grid */
      .whr,.wr{grid-template-columns:100px repeat(7,1fr);}
      .whn{font-size:13px;padding:10px 10px;}
      .whc{font-size:11px;padding:8px 3px;}
      .wd{width:32px;height:32px;}
      /* Stats */
      .stats-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:8px;}
      .sv{font-size:30px;}
      .sl{font-size:12px;}
      .stat-card{padding:16px 10px;}
      /* General text sizing */
      .fi,.fs,.ft{font-size:17px!important;padding:14px 16px!important;}
      .btn,.bp,.bs{font-size:16px!important;padding:14px 24px!important;}
      .fl{font-size:14px!important;}
      .login-input{font-size:18px!important;padding:16px 18px!important;}
      .login-btn{font-size:18px!important;padding:18px!important;}
      .google-btn{font-size:17px!important;padding:16px 22px!important;}
      .login-card{padding:32px 20px;}
      /* ALL text on mobile - minimum 16px */
      .main div,.main span,.main p,.main a,.main label{font-size:16px;}
      /* Specific overrides for key areas */
      .card-label{font-size:12px!important;}
      div[style*="font-size:10px"]{font-size:13px!important;}
      div[style*="font-size:11px"]{font-size:14px!important;}
      div[style*="font-size:12px"]{font-size:15px!important;}
      div[style*="font-size:13px"]{font-size:16px!important;}
      div[style*="font-size:14px"]{font-size:17px!important;}
      span[style*="font-size:10px"]{font-size:13px!important;}
      span[style*="font-size:11px"]{font-size:14px!important;}
      span[style*="font-size:12px"]{font-size:15px!important;}
      /* Coach dashboard */
      .client-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
      .cc{padding:18px;}
      .cn{font-size:17px;}
      .ce{font-size:14px;}
      .cstats{gap:10px;font-size:14px;}
      /* Coach compact */
      .coach-compact{flex-direction:column;}
      .cdiv{width:100%;height:1px;}
      /* Category tags hide */
      .hcat{display:none;}
      /* Modal */
      .modal{max-width:96vw;}
      .mh h3{font-size:18px;}
      /* Resource cards */
      .main div[style*="grid-template-columns"]{grid-template-columns:1fr!important;}
      }
      @keyframes cp{0%{transform:scale(1);}50%{transform:scale(1.3);}100%{transform:scale(1);}}
      .habit-card.jc .hc{animation:cp 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);}
      </style>
      <link href="https://assets.calendly.com/assets/external/widget.css" rel="stylesheet">
      <script src="https://assets.calendly.com/assets/external/widget.js" async></script>
      </head>
      <body>
      <div id="app"><div class="login-screen"><div class="loading-spinner"></div></div></div>
      <script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.12.2/firebase-app-compat.js"></script>
      <script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.12.2/firebase-auth-compat.js"></script>
      <script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.12.2/firebase-firestore-compat.js"></script>
      <script>

      var CE=['[email protected]','[email protected]'];
      var CAL='https://calendly.com/scalingminds/60-minute-coaching-session';
      var ZM='https://us02web.zoom.us/s/3810541297';
      var FC={apiKey:"AIzaSyD9LOsaX3mDEH50osEmycD-10qUVap6nGU",authDomain:"scaling-minds-portal.firebaseapp.com",projectId:"scaling-minds-portal",storageBucket:"scaling-minds-portal.firebasestorage.app",messagingSenderId:"340348098507",appId:"1:340348098507:web:18072c671091879534884e"};
      firebase.initializeApp(FC);var auth=firebase.auth(),db=firebase.firestore(),prov=new firebase.auth.GoogleAuthProvider();
      var CATS=[{id:'leadership',l:'Leadership',c:'cat-leadership'},{id:'communication',l:'Communication',c:'cat-communication'},{id:'wellbeing',l:'Wellbeing',c:'cat-wellbeing'},{id:'relationships',l:'Relationships',c:'cat-relationships'},{id:'productivity',l:'Productivity',c:'cat-productivity'},{id:'mindset',l:'Mindset',c:'cat-mindset'},{id:'custom',l:'Custom',c:'cat-custom'}];
      var QT=[{t:"The team you're on is more important than the team you lead.",a:"Andy Hite"},{t:"What got you here won't get you there.",a:"Marshall Goldsmith"},{t:"We don't rise to the level of our goals. We fall to the level of our systems.",a:"James Clear"},{t:"Vulnerability is the birthplace of trust.",a:"Brené Brown"},{t:"Your habits shape your identity, and your identity shapes your habits.",a:"James Clear"},{t:"People don't resist change. They resist being changed.",a:"Peter Senge"},{t:"Culture eats strategy for breakfast.",a:"Peter Drucker"},{t:"Be curious, not judgmental.",a:"Walt Whitman"},{t:"Small disciplines repeated with consistency every day lead to great achievements gained slowly over time.",a:"John C. Maxwell"},{t:"First, break all the rules.",a:"Marcus Buckingham"},{t:"You manage things. You lead people.",a:"Grace Hopper"}];
      var DN=['Sunday','Monday','Tuesday','Wednesday','Thursday','Friday','Saturday'],DS=['Sun','Mon','Tue','Wed','Thu','Fri','Sat'],MN=['January','February','March','April','May','June','July','August','September','October','November','December'];
      var ID=7;
      // Default data shape
      function dd(){return{habits:[],completions:{},notes:{},startDate:null,endDate:null,nextSession:null,focusOfWeek:'',todos:[],sessionPrep:'',docs:[],goals:[],sessionNotes:[]};}
      var S={user:null,data:dd(),view:'home',mo:false,eh:null,ic:false,cls:[],sc:null,cv:'clients',lib:[]};
      // Helpers
      function dq(){var t=new Date();return QT[(t.getFullYear()*10000+(t.getMonth()+1)*100+t.getDate())%QT.length];}
      function dk(d){return d.getFullYear()+'-'+String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0')+'-'+String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,'0');}
      function e(s){return String(s).replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;').replace(/"/g,'&quot;');}
      function wd(){var t=new Date(),d=t.getDay(),m=new Date(t);m.setDate(t.getDate()-((d+6)%7));var r=[];for(var i=0;i<7;i++){var x=new Date(m);x.setDate(m.getDate()+i);r.push(x);}return r;}
      function ic(){return S.user&&CE.indexOf(S.user.email)!==-1;}
      function fd(s){if(!s)return'\u2014';var p=s.split('-');var d=new Date(p[0],p[1]-1,p[2]);return MN[d.getMonth()]+' '+d.getDate()+', '+p[0];}
      function fs(s){if(!s)return'\u2014';var p=s.split('-');var d=new Date(p[0],p[1]-1,p[2]);return DS[d.getDay()]+', '+MN[d.getMonth()]+' '+d.getDate();}
      function fdt(s){if(!s)return'\u2014';var d;if(s.indexOf('T')!==-1)d=new Date(s);else{var p=s.split('-');d=new Date(p[0],p[1]-1,p[2]);}var h=d.getHours(),m=d.getMinutes(),ap=h>=12?'PM':'AM';h=h%12;if(h===0)h=12;return MN[d.getMonth()]+' '+d.getDate()+' at '+h+':'+(m<10?'0':'')+m+' '+ap;}
      function streak(data){var s=0,d=new Date();while(true){var k=dk(d),due=data.habits.filter(function(h){return hdue(h,d);}),done=due.filter(function(h){return data.completions[k]&&data.completions[k].indexOf(h.id)!==-1;});if(due.length>0&&done.length===due.length){s++;d.setDate(d.getDate()-1);}else if(s===0){d.setDate(d.getDate()-1);var k2=dk(d),due2=data.habits.filter(function(h){return hdue(h,d);}),done2=due2.filter(function(h){return data.completions[k2]&&data.completions[k2].indexOf(h.id)!==-1;});if(due2.length>0&&done2.length===due2.length){s++;d.setDate(d.getDate()-1);}else break;}else break;}return s;}
      // Check if habit is due on date. freq: 'daily'(default), 'days' (specific days array 0-6), 'weekly' (X times per week - always due, scored differently)
      function hdue(h,d){if(!h.freq||h.freq==='daily')return true;if(h.freq==='days'){var days=h.freqDays||[];return days.indexOf(d.getDay())!==-1;}if(h.freq==='weekly')return true;return true;}
      function hdueDk(h,k){var p=k.split('-'),d=new Date(p[0],p[1]-1,p[2]);return hdue(h,d);}
      // Count how many days a habit was due in a date range
      function hdueCount(h,dayKeys){if(!h.freq||h.freq==='daily')return dayKeys.length;if(h.freq==='days'){return dayKeys.filter(function(k){return hdueDk(h,k);}).length;}if(h.freq==='weekly'){var weeks=Math.max(1,Math.ceil(dayKeys.length/7));return(h.freqPerWeek||1)*weeks;}return dayKeys.length;}
      function crate(data){var sd=data.startDate||null;if(!sd){var ad=Object.keys(data.completions).filter(function(k){return(data.completions[k]||[]).length>0;}).sort();if(ad.length>0)sd=ad[0];}if(!sd||data.habits.length===0)return 0;var sp=sd.split('-'),s=new Date(sp[0],sp[1]-1,sp[2]),t=new Date(),numDays=Math.max(1,Math.min(90,Math.floor((t-s)/(864e5))+1));var dayKeys=[];for(var i=0;i<numDays;i++){var d=new Date(t);d.setDate(d.getDate()-i);dayKeys.push(dk(d));}var totalDue=0,totalDone=0;data.habits.forEach(function(h){var due=hdueCount(h,dayKeys);totalDue+=due;var done=0;dayKeys.forEach(function(k){var c=data.completions[k]||[];if(c.indexOf(h.id)!==-1)done++;});totalDone+=Math.min(done,due);});return totalDue>0?Math.round((totalDone/totalDue)*100):0;}
      function adays(data){var sd=data.startDate||null;if(!sd){var ad=Object.keys(data.completions).filter(function(k){return(data.completions[k]||[]).length>0;}).sort();if(ad.length>0)sd=ad[0];}if(!sd)return 0;var sp=sd.split('-');return Math.max(1,Math.floor((new Date()-new Date(sp[0],sp[1]-1,sp[2]))/864e5)+1);}
      function la(data){var dates=Object.keys(data.completions).sort(function(a,b){return b.localeCompare(a);});for(var i=0;i<dates.length;i++){if((data.completions[dates[i]]||[]).length>0)return dates[i];}return null;}
      function ds(s){if(!s)return 999;var p=s.split('-');return Math.floor((new Date()-new Date(p[0],p[1]-1,p[2]))/864e5);}
      function ep(data){if(!data.startDate||!data.endDate)return null;var sp=data.startDate.split('-'),ep2=data.endDate.split('-');var sd=new Date(sp[0],sp[1]-1,sp[2]),ed=new Date(ep2[0],ep2[1]-1,ep2[2]),t=new Date();return Math.min(100,Math.round(Math.max(0,(t-sd)/(864e5))/Math.max(1,(ed-sd)/(864e5))*100));}
      // Firebase
      var st=null;
      function save(){if(!S.user)return;clearTimeout(st);st=setTimeout(function(){var d=S.data;db.collection('users').doc(S.user.uid).set({habits:d.habits,completions:d.completions,notes:d.notes||{},startDate:d.startDate||null,endDate:d.endDate||null,nextSession:d.nextSession||null,focusOfWeek:d.focusOfWeek||'',todos:d.todos||[],sessionPrep:d.sessionPrep||'',docs:d.docs||[],goals:d.goals||[],sessionNotes:d.sessionNotes||[],displayName:S.user.displayName||'',email:S.user.email||'',photoURL:S.user.photoURL||'',updatedAt:firebase.firestore.FieldValue.serverTimestamp()},{merge:true});},800);}
      function load(cb){if(!S.user)return;db.collection('users').doc(S.user.uid).get().then(function(doc){if(doc.exists){var d=doc.data();S.data.habits=d.habits||[];S.data.completions=d.completions||{};S.data.notes=d.notes||{};S.data.startDate=d.startDate||null;S.data.endDate=d.endDate||null;S.data.nextSession=d.nextSession||null;S.data.focusOfWeek=d.focusOfWeek||'';S.data.todos=d.todos||[];S.data.sessionPrep=d.sessionPrep||'';S.data.docs=d.docs||[];S.data.goals=d.goals||[];S.data.sessionNotes=d.sessionNotes||[];S.data.calendlyUrl=d.calendlyUrl||null;}if(cb)cb();}).catch(function(){if(cb)cb();});}
      function loadAll(cb){db.collection('users').get().then(function(sn){S.cls=[];sn.forEach(function(doc){var d=doc.data();if(CE.indexOf(d.email)===-1){S.cls.push({uid:doc.id,displayName:d.displayName||'Unknown',email:d.email||'',photoURL:d.photoURL||'',phone:d.phone||'',birthday:d.birthday||'',address:d.address||'',company:d.company||'',title:d.title||'',archived:d.archived||false,habits:d.habits||[],completions:d.completions||{},notes:d.notes||{},startDate:d.startDate||null,endDate:d.endDate||null,nextSession:d.nextSession||null,focusOfWeek:d.focusOfWeek||'',todos:d.todos||[],sessionPrep:d.sessionPrep||'',docs:d.docs||[],goals:d.goals||[],sessionNotes:d.sessionNotes||[],calendlyUrl:d.calendlyUrl||null});}});if(cb)cb();}).catch(function(e2){console.error(e2);if(cb)cb();});}
      function scf(uid,f){db.collection('users').doc(uid).set(f,{merge:true}).then(function(){var c=S.cls.find(function(x){return x.uid===uid;});if(c)Object.keys(f).forEach(function(k){c[k]=f[k];});if(S.sc&&S.sc.uid===uid)Object.keys(f).forEach(function(k){S.sc[k]=f[k];});R();});}
      function loadLib(cb){db.collection('library').doc('resources').get().then(function(doc){if(doc.exists){S.lib=doc.data().items||[];console.log('Library loaded:',S.lib.length,'items');}else{S.lib=[];console.log('Library doc does not exist yet');}if(cb)cb();}).catch(function(err){S.lib=[];console.error('Library load error:',err.message);if(cb)cb();});}
      function saveLib(items){db.collection('library').doc('resources').set({items:items}).then(function(){S.lib=items;R();});}
      // Auth
      function si(){auth.signInWithPopup(prov).catch(function(err){alert('Google sign in failed: '+err.message);});}
      function siep(){
      var em=document.getElementById('login-email').value.trim(),pw=document.getElementById('login-pw').value;
      var errEl=document.getElementById('login-err');
      if(!em||!pw){errEl.textContent='Please enter email and password.';return;}
      errEl.textContent='';
      auth.signInWithEmailAndPassword(em,pw).catch(function(err){
      if(err.code==='auth/user-not-found'||err.code==='auth/invalid-credential'){
      // Try creating account
      auth.createUserWithEmailAndPassword(em,pw).catch(function(err2){errEl.textContent=err2.message;});
      } else {errEl.textContent=err.message;}
      });
      }
      function so(){auth.signOut();}
      auth.onAuthStateChanged(function(u){if(u){S.user=u;S.ic=ic();if(S.ic){S.view='clients';S.cv='clients';db.collection('users').doc(u.uid).set({displayName:u.displayName||'',email:u.email||'',photoURL:u.photoURL||''},{merge:true});loadAll(function(){loadLib(function(){R();});});}else{var sv2='home';try{sv2=localStorage.getItem('sm_view')||'home';}catch(e){}var validViews=['home','goals','sessions','habits','journal','progress','docs','profile'];S.view=validViews.indexOf(sv2)!==-1?sv2:'home';load(function(){loadLib(function(){save();R();});});}}else{S.user=null;S.ic=false;S.data=dd();S.cls=[];S.lib=[];rl();}});
      function rl(){document.getElementById('app').innerHTML='<div class="login-screen"><div class="login-card"><img class="login-logo" src="'+L+'" alt="Scaling Minds"><h1>Client Portal</h1><p>Track habits, reflect, and grow. Sign in to sync across all your devices.</p><div id="login-err" class="login-error"></div><input class="login-input" id="login-email" type="email" placeholder="Email address"><div style="position:relative"><input class="login-input" id="login-pw" type="password" placeholder="Password" style="padding-right:44px"><button onclick="var p=document.getElementById(\'login-pw\');p.type=p.type===\'password\'?\'text\':\'password\';this.innerHTML=p.type===\'password\'?\'Show\':\'Hide\'" style="position:absolute;right:12px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);background:none;border:none;font-size:12px;color:var(--green-muted);cursor:pointer;font-family:\'DM Sans\',sans-serif;font-weight:600">Show</button></div><button class="login-btn" onclick="siep()">Sign In</button><div class="login-divider">or</div><button class="google-btn" onclick="si()"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 48 48"><path fill="#EA4335" d="M24 9.5c3.54 0 6.71 1.22 9.21 3.6l6.85-6.85C35.9 2.38 30.47 0 24 0 14.62 0 6.51 5.38 2.56 13.22l7.98 6.19C12.43 13.72 17.74 9.5 24 9.5z"/><path fill="#4285F4" d="M46.98 24.55c0-1.57-.15-3.09-.38-4.55H24v9.02h12.94c-.58 2.96-2.26 5.48-4.78 7.18l7.73 6c4.51-4.18 7.09-10.36 7.09-17.65z"/><path fill="#FBBC05" d="M10.53 28.59c-.48-1.45-.76-2.99-.76-4.59s.27-3.14.76-4.59l-7.98-6.19C.92 16.46 0 20.12 0 24c0 3.88.92 7.54 2.56 10.78l7.97-6.19z"/><path fill="#34A853" d="M24 48c6.48 0 11.93-2.13 15.89-5.81l-7.73-6c-2.15 1.45-4.92 2.3-8.16 2.3-6.26 0-11.57-4.22-13.47-9.91l-7.98 6.19C6.51 42.62 14.62 48 24 48z"/></svg>Sign in with Google</button><div class="login-footer">&copy; Scaling Minds</div></div></div>';}
      function R(){
      if(!S.user){rl();return;}
      // Check if user needs to set up their name
      if(!S.ic&&!S.user.displayName&&!S._nameSet){
      // Check Firestore for saved name
      db.collection('users').doc(S.user.uid).get().then(function(doc){
      if(doc.exists&&doc.data().displayName){S._nameSet=true;R();}
      else{rSetup();}
      }).catch(function(){rSetup();});
      return;
      }
      if(S.ic){rCA();return;}rC();
      }
      function rSetup(){
      var h='<div class="login-screen"><div class="login-card" style="max-width:440px"><img class="login-logo" src="'+L+'" alt="Scaling Minds"><h1>Welcome!</h1><p>Let\'s get you set up. This takes about 30 seconds.</p><div id="setup-err" class="login-error"></div>';
      h+='<input class="login-input" id="setup-first" type="text" placeholder="First name *">';
      h+='<input class="login-input" id="setup-last" type="text" placeholder="Last name *">';
      h+='<input class="login-input" id="setup-company" type="text" placeholder="Company">';
      h+='<input class="login-input" id="setup-title" type="text" placeholder="Title / Role">';
      h+='<input class="login-input" id="setup-phone" type="tel" placeholder="Phone number">';
      h+='<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px"><select class="login-input" id="setup-bm" style="flex:1"><option value="">Birthday month</option>';
      ['January','February','March','April','May','June','July','August','September','October','November','December'].forEach(function(m,i){h+='<option value="'+(i+1)+'">'+m+'</option>';});
      h+='</select><select class="login-input" id="setup-bd" style="width:80px"><option value="">Day</option>';
      for(var i=1;i<=31;i++){h+='<option value="'+i+'">'+i+'</option>';}
      h+='</select></div>';
      h+='<input class="login-input" id="setup-addr" type="text" placeholder="Street address">';
      h+='<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px"><input class="login-input" id="setup-city" type="text" placeholder="City" style="flex:2;margin:0"><input class="login-input" id="setup-state" type="text" placeholder="State" style="width:70px;margin:0"><input class="login-input" id="setup-zip" type="text" placeholder="Zip" style="width:80px;margin:0"></div>';
      h+='<button class="login-btn" onclick="saveSetup()">Continue</button></div></div>';
      document.getElementById('app').innerHTML=h;
      }
      function saveSetup(){
      var f=document.getElementById('setup-first').value.trim(),l=document.getElementById('setup-last').value.trim();
      if(!f||!l){document.getElementById('setup-err').textContent='Please enter your first and last name.';return;}
      var name=f+' '+l;
      var company=document.getElementById('setup-company').value.trim();
      var title=document.getElementById('setup-title').value.trim();
      var phone=document.getElementById('setup-phone').value.trim();
      var bm=document.getElementById('setup-bm').value,bd=document.getElementById('setup-bd').value;
      var addr=document.getElementById('setup-addr').value.trim(),city=document.getElementById('setup-city').value.trim(),st=document.getElementById('setup-state').value.trim(),zip=document.getElementById('setup-zip').value.trim();
      var profile={displayName:name,company:company||'',title:title||'',phone:phone||'',birthday:bm&&bd?bm+'/'+bd:'',address:addr?addr+(city?', '+city:'')+(st?' '+st:'')+(zip?' '+zip:''):''};
      S.user.updateProfile({displayName:name}).then(function(){
      S._nameSet=true;
      db.collection('users').doc(S.user.uid).set(profile,{merge:true});
      R();
      }).catch(function(err){document.getElementById('setup-err').textContent=err.message;});
      }
      // ══════════════════════════════════
      // CLIENT APP
      // ══════════════════════════════════
      function rC(){
      var app=document.getElementById('app'),td=new Date(),ts=dk(td),comp=S.data.completions[ts]||[],sk=streak(S.data),q=dq();
      var h='<div class="sticky-top"><div class="header"><div class="header-left"><img class="header-logo" src="'+L+'" alt="SM"><div><h1>Client Portal</h1><div class="header-subtitle">'+e(S.user.displayName||'')+' &middot; Scaling Minds</div></div></div><div class="header-right">';
      if(sk>0)h+='<div class="streak-badge">🔥 '+sk+' day streak</div>';
      if(S.user.photoURL)h+='<img class="user-avatar" src="'+S.user.photoURL+'" alt="">';
      h+='<button class="signout-btn" onclick="so()">Sign out</button></div></div>';
      // NAV: Home Goals Sessions Habits Journal Progress Documents
      var navItems=[{v:'home',l:'Home'},{v:'goals',l:'Goals'},{v:'sessions',l:'Sessions'},{v:'habits',l:'Habits'},{v:'journal',l:'Journal'},{v:'progress',l:'Progress'},{v:'docs',l:'Documents'},{v:'profile',l:'Profile'}];
      h+='<div class="nav-bar">';
      navItems.forEach(function(t){
      h+='<div class="nav-tab'+(S.view===t.v?' active':'')+'" onclick="sv(\''+t.v+'\')">'+t.l+'</div>';
      });
      h+='</div></div>';
      // Mobile hamburger - compact single row header
      h+='<div class="mob-nav"><div class="mob-nav-bar">';
      h+='<img class="header-logo" src="'+L+'" alt="SM" style="height:30px;margin-right:10px">';
      h+='<span style="font-family:\'DM Serif Display\',serif;font-size:16px;color:var(--cream-light);flex:1">Client Portal</span>';
      var curTab=navItems.find(function(t){return t.v===S.view;})||navItems[0];
      h+='<span style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--gold);margin-right:12px">'+curTab.l+'</span>';
      h+='<div class="mob-nav-current" onclick="toggleMobNav()"><svg class="mob-ham" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--cream-light)" stroke-width="2"><line x1="3" y1="6" x2="21" y2="6"/><line x1="3" y1="12" x2="21" y2="12"/><line x1="3" y1="18" x2="21" y2="18"/></svg></div>';
      h+='</div>';
      h+='<div class="mob-nav-menu" id="mob-menu" style="display:none">';
      navItems.forEach(function(t){
      h+='<div class="mob-nav-item'+(S.view===t.v?' mob-active':'')+'" onclick="sv(\''+t.v+'\');closeMobNav()">'+t.l+'</div>';
      });
      h+='<div class="mob-nav-item" style="color:#c0392b;border-top:2px solid var(--cream-light)" onclick="so()">Sign Out</div>';
      h+='</div></div>';
      h+='<div class="main">';
      if(S.view==='home') h+=rHome(td,ts,comp,sk,q);
      else if(S.view==='goals') h+=rGoals(S.data);
      else if(S.view==='sessions') h+=rSessions(S.data);
      else if(S.view==='habits') h+=rHabits(td,ts,comp);
      else if(S.view==='journal') h+=rJournal(ts);
      else if(S.view==='progress') h+=rProgress(td,S.data);
      else if(S.view==='docs') h+=rDocs(S.data);
      else if(S.view==='profile') h+=rProfile();
      h+='</div><div class="footer">&copy; Scaling Minds &middot; Client Portal</div>';
      h+='<div class="modal-overlay'+(S.mo?' open':'')+'" onclick="cmo(event)"><div class="modal">'+rModal()+'</div></div>';
      app.innerHTML=h;
      }
      // HOME
      function rHome(td,ts,comp,sk,q){
      var h='';
      // Welcome
      var hr=td.getHours(),greet=hr<12?'Good morning':hr<17?'Good afternoon':'Good evening';
      var fname=(S.user.displayName||S.user.email||'').split(' ')[0].split('@')[0];
      h+='<div style="margin-bottom:8px"><div style="font-family:\'DM Serif Display\',serif;font-size:26px;color:var(--green);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px"><span>'+greet+', '+e(fname)+'</span>';
      if(sk>0)h+='<span class="streak-badge mob-streak" style="font-size:13px">🔥 '+sk+'</span>';
      h+='</div>';
      h+='<div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:2px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;flex-wrap:wrap">';
      if(S.data.nextSession){var nd2;if(S.data.nextSession.indexOf('T')!==-1)nd2=new Date(S.data.nextSession);else{var np2=S.data.nextSession.split('-');nd2=new Date(np2[0],np2[1]-1,np2[2]);}var daysUntil=Math.ceil((nd2-new Date())/864e5);if(daysUntil>=0)h+='<span><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--green-muted)" stroke-width="2" style="vertical-align:-2px"><rect x="3" y="4" width="18" height="18" rx="2" ry="2"/><line x1="16" y1="2" x2="16" y2="6"/><line x1="8" y1="2" x2="8" y2="6"/><line x1="3" y1="10" x2="21" y2="10"/></svg> Next session in '+daysUntil+' day'+(daysUntil!==1?'s':'')+'</span>';}
      if(S.data.habits.length>0){var dueToday=S.data.habits.filter(function(h2){return hdue(h2,td);}).length,doneToday=comp.length;h+='<span><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--green-muted)" stroke-width="2" style="vertical-align:-2px"><polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"/></svg> '+doneToday+' of '+dueToday+' habits done today</span>';}
      h+='</div></div>';
      // Quote
      h+='<div class="quote-line" style="margin:24px 0 36px">&ldquo;'+e(q.t)+'&rdquo;<span>&mdash; '+e(q.a)+'</span></div>';
      // Session prep (48hrs before - stays on home as it's time-sensitive)
      var showPrep=false;
      if(S.data.nextSession){var nd;if(S.data.nextSession.indexOf('T')!==-1)nd=new Date(S.data.nextSession);else{var np=S.data.nextSession.split('-');nd=new Date(np[0],np[1]-1,np[2]);}if((nd-new Date())/36e5<=48&&(nd-new Date())/36e5>-24)showPrep=true;}
      if(showPrep){
      h+='<div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(184,134,11,0.06),rgba(184,134,11,0.02));border:1px solid rgba(184,134,11,0.3);border-radius:12px;padding:18px 22px;margin-bottom:36px">';
      h+='<div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.8px;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:4px">Session Prep</div>';
      h+='<div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:8px">Your session is coming up. Take a few minutes to reflect.</div>';
      h+='<textarea class="ft" style="min-height:80px;border-color:rgba(184,134,11,0.3)" placeholder="What do you want to focus on? What has been hard? What are you proud of?" oninput="ssp(this.value)">'+e(S.data.sessionPrep||'')+'</textarea></div>';
      }
      // Commitments from last session
      var sn=(S.data.sessionNotes||[]).sort(function(a,b){return b.date.localeCompare(a.date);});
      if(sn.length>0&&sn[0].commitments){
      h+='<div style="background:var(--white);border-left:4px solid var(--green);border-radius:0 12px 12px 0;padding:18px 22px;margin-bottom:36px">';
      h+='<div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.8px;color:var(--green-muted);margin-bottom:3px">What You\'re Working On</div>';
      h+='<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:10px">From your '+fs(sn[0].date)+' session</div>';
      sn[0].commitments.split('\n').forEach(function(line){if(line.trim())h+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px;padding:4px 0;font-size:14px;line-height:1.5"><span style="color:var(--green);font-weight:700;margin-top:1px">&rarr;</span> '+e(line.trim())+'</div>';});
      h+='</div>';
      }
      // Two column: Habits + Todos side by side
      var todos=S.data.todos||[],ag=(S.data.goals||[]).filter(function(g){return g.status==='active';});
      var dueToday=S.data.habits.filter(function(h2){return hdue(h2,td);});
      var doneCount=dueToday.filter(function(h2){return comp.indexOf(h2.id)!==-1;}).length;
      if(dueToday.length>0||true){
      h+='<div style="display:flex;gap:14px;margin-bottom:20px;flex-wrap:wrap">';
      // Habits (left)
      if(dueToday.length>0){
      h+='<div style="flex:1;min-width:260px"><div class="card"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:6px"><div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--green)">Today\'s Habits</div><span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted)">'+doneCount+'/'+dueToday.length+'</span></div>';
      dueToday.forEach(function(hab){var ck=comp.indexOf(hab.id)!==-1;var flbl=hab.freq==='days'?(hab.freqDays||[]).map(function(d2){return DS[d2];}).join(', '):hab.freq==='weekly'?(hab.freqPerWeek||1)+'x/wk':'';
      h+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:7px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--cream-light)">';
      h+='<div style="width:20px;height:20px;min-width:20px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid '+(ck?'var(--check-green)':'var(--border)')+';background:'+(ck?'var(--check-green)':'transparent')+';display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:pointer" onclick="th(\''+hab.id+'\')">';
      if(ck)h+='<svg width="10" height="10" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"><polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"/></svg>';
      h+='</div><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:500;flex:1;'+(ck?'color:var(--green-muted)':'')+'">'+e(hab.name)+'</div>';
      if(flbl)h+='<span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted)">'+flbl+'</span>';
      h+='</div>';
      });
      h+='</div></div>';
      }
      // Todos (right) - always show with add input
      h+='<div style="flex:1;min-width:260px"><div class="card"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:10px"><div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--green)">To-Dos</div>';
      if(todos.length>0){var td2=todos.filter(function(t){return t.done;}).length;h+='<span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted)">'+td2+'/'+todos.length+' done</span>';}
      h+='</div>';
      todos.forEach(function(t,i){
      h+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:9px;padding:7px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--cream-light)">';
      h+='<div style="width:18px;height:18px;min-width:18px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid '+(t.done?'var(--check-green)':'var(--border)')+';background:'+(t.done?'var(--check-green)':'transparent')+';display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-top:1px;cursor:pointer" onclick="tt('+i+')">';
      if(t.done)h+='<svg width="9" height="9" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"><polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"/></svg>';
      h+='</div><div style="flex:1"><div style="font-size:12px;'+(t.done?'color:var(--green-muted);text-decoration:line-through':'')+'">'+e(t.text)+'</div>';
      if(t.link)h+='<a href="'+e(t.link)+'" target="_blank" onclick="event.stopPropagation()" style="font-size:10px;color:var(--green);text-decoration:none">↗ link</a>';
      h+='</div><button class="abtn del" onclick="dtd('+i+')" style="opacity:0.5;width:20px;height:20px" title="Remove"><svg width="10" height="10" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><line x1="18" y1="6" x2="6" y2="18"/><line x1="6" y1="6" x2="18" y2="18"/></svg></button></div>';
      });
      h+='<div style="display:flex;gap:6px;margin-top:8px"><input class="fi" id="ctd" type="text" placeholder="Add a to-do..." style="font-size:11px;padding:6px 10px"><button class="btn bp" onclick="catd()" style="padding:6px 12px;font-size:11px">Add</button></div>';
      h+='</div></div>';
      h+='</div>';
      }
      // Goals below (full width)
      if(ag.length>0){
      h+='<div class="card" style="margin-bottom:36px"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:10px"><div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--green)">Active Goals</div><span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer" onclick="sv(\'goals\')">View all &rarr;</span></div>';
      ag.slice(0,4).forEach(function(g){
      var pct=g.progress||0;
      h+='<div style="padding:10px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--cream-light)">';
      h+='<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:2px"><div style="font-weight:600;font-size:13px;color:var(--green)">'+e(g.title)+'</div><span style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--green)">'+pct+'%</span></div>';
      if(g.outcome)h+='<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:6px">'+e(g.outcome)+'</div>';
      h+='<div style="background:var(--cream-light);border-radius:4px;height:7px;overflow:hidden"><div style="height:100%;border-radius:4px;width:'+pct+'%;background:'+(pct>=70?'var(--check-green)':pct>=40?'var(--gold)':'var(--green-muted)')+'"></div></div>';
      h+='</div>';
      });
      h+='</div>';
      }
      // Encouragement
      var allTodosDone=todos.length>0&&todos.every(function(t){return t.done;});
      var allHabitsDone=dueToday.length>0&&dueToday.every(function(h2){return comp.indexOf(h2.id)!==-1;});
      if(allTodosDone||allHabitsDone){
      var msg=allTodosDone&&allHabitsDone?'All habits and to-dos done. Strong day.':allTodosDone?'All to-dos complete. Keep it going.':'All habits done today. Nice work.';
      h+='<div style="text-align:center;padding:14px;background:rgba(45,106,79,0.05);border-radius:10px;margin-bottom:36px;font-size:13px;color:var(--green);font-weight:500">✓ '+msg+'</div>';
      }
      // Empty state for new clients
      if(sn.length===0&&todos.length===0&&ag.length===0&&S.data.habits.length===0){
      h+='<div style="text-align:center;padding:40px 20px;background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;margin-bottom:36px">';
      h+='<div style="font-size:24px;margin-bottom:12px">👋</div>';
      h+='<div style="font-family:\'DM Serif Display\',serif;font-size:18px;color:var(--green);margin-bottom:6px">Welcome to your coaching portal</div>';
      h+='<div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text-muted);max-width:360px;margin:0 auto">Your coach will set things up for you soon. In the meantime, check out your Documents tab for onboarding materials.</div></div>';
      }
      // Message coach
      h+='<a href="mailto:[email protected]?subject=Message from '+encodeURIComponent(S.data.displayName||S.user.displayName||'your client')+'" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;background:var(--green);border-radius:12px;padding:14px 18px;margin-bottom:14px;text-decoration:none;transition:all 0.2s" onmouseover="this.style.opacity=\'0.9\'" onmouseout="this.style.opacity=\'1\'">';
      h+='<div style="width:34px;height:34px;min-width:34px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);border-radius:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--cream-light)" stroke-width="2"><path d="M21 15a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H7l-4 4V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h14a2 2 0 0 1 2 2z"/></svg></div>';
      h+='<div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:var(--cream-light)">Message Your Coach</div></a>';
      // Quick note
      h+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:14px 18px;margin-bottom:36px;cursor:pointer" onclick="sv(\'journal\')">';
      h+='<div style="width:34px;height:34px;min-width:34px;background:var(--cream-light);border-radius:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--green)" stroke-width="2"><path d="M12 20h9"/><path d="M16.5 3.5a2.121 2.121 0 0 1 3 3L7 19l-4 1 1-4 12.5-12.5z"/></svg></div>';
      h+='<div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text-muted)">Jot something down for your next session...</div></div>';
      // Coach line
      h+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:16px;padding:14px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted);flex-wrap:wrap">';
      h+='<span><strong style="color:var(--green)">Your Coach</strong> Andy Hite</span>';
      h+='<span style="color:var(--border)">|</span><a href="tel:3127728525" style="color:var(--green);text-decoration:none">312-772-8525</a>';
      h+='<span style="color:var(--border)">|</span><a href="mailto:[email protected]" style="color:var(--green);text-decoration:none">[email protected]</a>';
      h+='<span style="color:var(--border)">|</span><strong style="color:var(--green)">Client Success</strong> <a href="mailto:[email protected]" style="color:var(--green);text-decoration:none">Sasha Vargas</a> <a href="mailto:[email protected]" style="color:var(--text-muted);text-decoration:none;font-size:11px">[email protected]</a>';
      h+='</div>';
      return h;
      }
      // GOALS
      function rGoals(data){
      var goals=data.goals||[];
      var h='<h2 style="font-family:\'DM Serif Display\',serif;font-size:24px;color:var(--green);margin-bottom:16px">Goals</h2>';
      if(goals.length>0){
      var active=goals.filter(function(g){return g.status==='active';}),completed=goals.filter(function(g){return g.status==='completed';}),paused=goals.filter(function(g){return g.status==='paused';}),inactive=goals.filter(function(g){return g.status==='inactive';});
      if(active.length>0){h+='<div class="card-label" style="margin-bottom:10px">Active</div>';active.forEach(function(g){h+=gCard(g);});}
      if(completed.length>0){h+='<div class="card-label" style="margin-top:20px;margin-bottom:10px">Completed</div>';completed.forEach(function(g){h+=gCard(g);});}
      if(paused.length>0){h+='<div class="card-label" style="margin-top:20px;margin-bottom:10px">Paused</div>';paused.forEach(function(g){h+=gCard(g);});}
      if(inactive.length>0){
      h+='<div class="card-label" style="margin-top:28px;margin-bottom:10px;color:var(--text-muted)">Inactive</div>';
      h+='<div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:12px">Goals that are no longer being tracked. Progress is preserved.</div>';
      inactive.forEach(function(g){h+=gCard(g,true);});
      }
      } else {
      h+='<div class="empty"><div class="ei">🎯</div><h3>No goals yet</h3><p>Add a goal to get started, or your coach will set them with you.</p></div>';
      }
      // Client can add goals
      h+='<div class="card" style="margin-top:16px"><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--green);margin-bottom:8px">Add a Goal</div>';
      h+='<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:flex-end">';
      h+='<div class="fg" style="margin:0;flex:2;min-width:160px"><label class="fl">Goal</label><input class="fi" id="cgt" placeholder="What do you want to work toward?"></div>';
      h+='<div class="fg" style="margin:0;flex:1;min-width:140px"><label class="fl">Target Outcome</label><input class="fi" id="cgo" placeholder="How will you know?"></div>';
      h+='<button class="btn bp" onclick="cag()">Add</button></div></div>';
      return h;
      }
      function gCard(g,isInactive){
      var pct=g.progress||0;
      var h='<div class="goal-card" style="'+(isInactive?'opacity:0.65;':'')+'"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:4px">';
      h+='<div style="font-family:\'DM Serif Display\',serif;font-size:17px;color:var(--green);flex:1">'+e(g.title)+'</div>';
      h+='<select style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;padding:3px 6px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:4px;color:var(--green-muted);background:var(--white);cursor:pointer" onchange="cgst(\''+g.id+'\',this.value)">';
      h+='<option value="active"'+(g.status==='active'?' selected':'')+'>Active</option>';
      h+='<option value="completed"'+(g.status==='completed'?' selected':'')+'>Completed</option>';
      h+='<option value="paused"'+(g.status==='paused'?' selected':'')+'>Paused</option>';
      h+='<option value="inactive"'+(g.status==='inactive'?' selected':'')+'>Inactive</option>';
      h+='</select></div>';
      if(g.outcome)h+='<div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:8px">'+e(g.outcome)+'</div>';
      if(g.desc)h+='<div style="font-size:13px;line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:8px">'+e(g.desc)+'</div>';
      h+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px"><div style="flex:1;background:var(--cream-light);border-radius:4px;height:8px;overflow:hidden"><div style="height:100%;border-radius:4px;width:'+pct+'%;background:'+(isInactive?'#ccc':pct>=70?'var(--check-green)':pct>=40?'var(--gold)':'var(--green-muted)')+'"></div></div>';
      h+='<span style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:'+(isInactive?'var(--text-muted)':'var(--green)')+';min-width:36px;text-align:right">'+pct+'%</span></div>';
      if(g.status==='active'){h+='<div style="margin-top:8px"><input type="range" min="0" max="100" value="'+pct+'" style="width:100%;accent-color:var(--green)" onchange="ugp(\''+g.id+'\',this.value)"></div>';}
      // Show history timeline if it exists
      if(g.history&&g.history.length>0){
      h+='<div style="margin-top:10px;padding-top:8px;border-top:1px solid var(--cream-light)">';
      h+='<div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:4px">History</div>';
      g.history.forEach(function(ev){
      h+='<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);padding:2px 0"><span style="color:var(--green-muted);font-weight:600">'+ev.status+'</span> &middot; '+fs(ev.date)+'</div>';
      });
      h+='</div>';
      }
      h+='</div>';return h;
      }
      // SESSIONS
      function rSessions(data){
      var calUrl=data.calendlyUrl||CAL;
      var h='<h2 style="font-family:\'DM Serif Display\',serif;font-size:24px;color:var(--green);margin-bottom:6px">Sessions</h2>';
      // Next session
      if(data.nextSession){
      h+='<div style="display:flex;gap:10px;margin:14px 0;flex-wrap:wrap">';
      h+='<div style="flex:1;min-width:200px;background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:14px 18px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px">';
      h+='<div style="width:36px;height:36px;min-width:36px;background:var(--cream-light);border-radius:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--green)" stroke-width="2"><rect x="3" y="4" width="18" height="18" rx="2" ry="2"/><line x1="16" y1="2" x2="16" y2="6"/><line x1="8" y1="2" x2="8" y2="6"/><line x1="3" y1="10" x2="21" y2="10"/></svg></div>';
      h+='<div><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px;color:var(--text-muted)">Upcoming</div><div style="font-weight:600;font-size:14px;color:var(--green)">'+fdt(data.nextSession)+'</div></div>';
      h+='<a href="'+ZM+'" target="_blank" class="zoom-btn"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><polygon points="23 7 16 12 23 17 23 7"/><rect x="1" y="5" width="15" height="14" rx="2" ry="2"/></svg>Zoom</a></div>';
      h+='<div class="schedule-btn" onclick="openCal()"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"/><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"/></svg>Schedule</div></div>';
      } else {
      h+='<div style="background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:20px;margin:14px 0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px">';
      h+='<div><div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text)">No session scheduled</div><div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:2px">Book your next coaching session when you\'re ready.</div></div>';
      h+='<div class="schedule-btn" onclick="openCal()"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"/><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"/></svg>Schedule a Session</div></div>';
      }
      // Pre-session check-in link
      h+='<a href="https://scalingminds.github.io/coaching-check-in/" target="_blank" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:14px 18px;margin-bottom:14px;text-decoration:none;transition:all 0.2s" onmouseover="this.style.boxShadow=\'0 2px 12px rgba(27,67,50,0.08)\'" onmouseout="this.style.boxShadow=\'none\'">';
      h+='<div style="width:36px;height:36px;min-width:36px;background:rgba(184,134,11,0.1);border-radius:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--gold)" stroke-width="2"><path d="M9 11l3 3L22 4"/><path d="M21 12v7a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h11"/></svg></div>';
      h+='<div><div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:var(--green)">Pre-Session Check-In</div><div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted)">Complete before your next session</div></div></a>';
      // Session prep
      var sp=false;
      if(data.nextSession){var nd;if(data.nextSession.indexOf('T')!==-1)nd=new Date(data.nextSession);else{var np=data.nextSession.split('-');nd=new Date(np[0],np[1]-1,np[2]);}if((nd-new Date())/36e5<=48&&(nd-new Date())/36e5>-24)sp=true;}
      if(sp){
      h+='<div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(184,134,11,0.06),rgba(184,134,11,0.02));border:1px solid rgba(184,134,11,0.3);border-radius:12px;padding:16px 20px;margin-bottom:14px">';
      h+='<div class="card-label" style="color:var(--gold)">Session Prep</div><div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:8px">Your session is coming up. Take a few minutes to reflect.</div>';
      h+='<textarea class="ft" style="min-height:80px;border-color:rgba(184,134,11,0.3)" placeholder="What do you want to focus on? What has been hard? What are you proud of?" oninput="ssp(this.value)">'+e(data.sessionPrep||'')+'</textarea></div>';
      }
      // Session history
      var sn=(data.sessionNotes||[]).sort(function(a,b){return b.date.localeCompare(a.date);});
      if(sn.length>0){
      h+='<h3 style="font-family:\'DM Serif Display\',serif;font-size:17px;color:var(--green);margin:20px 0 12px">Session History</h3>';
      sn.forEach(function(s){
      h+='<div class="sn-card"><div class="sn-date">'+fs(s.date)+'</div>';
      if(s.themes){h+='<div class="sn-field"><div class="sn-field-label">Key Themes</div><div style="font-size:13px;line-height:1.5">'+e(s.themes)+'</div></div>';}
      if(s.commitments){h+='<div class="sn-field"><div class="sn-field-label">Commitments</div><div style="font-size:13px;line-height:1.5">'+e(s.commitments)+'</div></div>';}
      if(s.experiments){h+='<div class="sn-field"><div class="sn-field-label">Experiments</div><div style="font-size:13px;line-height:1.5">'+e(s.experiments)+'</div></div>';}
      if(s.notes){h+='<div class="sn-field"><div class="sn-field-label">Notes</div><div style="font-size:13px;line-height:1.5;white-space:pre-wrap">'+e(s.notes)+'</div></div>';}
      h+='</div>';
      });
      } else if(!sp){
      h+='<div class="empty" style="padding:32px"><div class="ei">📝</div><h3>No session notes yet</h3><p>Your coach will add notes after each session.</p></div>';
      }
      return h;
      }
      // HABITS (with weekly view toggle)
      function rHabits(td,ts,comp){
      var total=S.data.habits.length,done=comp.length,pct=total>0?Math.round((done/total)*100):0,h='';
      if(total===0)return '<div class="empty"><div class="ei">🌱</div><h3>Build Your Practice</h3><p>Add the habits that matter most to you right now.</p><button class="btn bp" style="margin-top:14px" onclick="oam()">+ Add Habit</button></div>';
      h+='<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:14px"><div><h2 style="font-family:\'DM Serif Display\',serif;font-size:24px;color:var(--green)">'+DN[td.getDay()]+'</h2><div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted)">'+MN[td.getMonth()]+' '+td.getDate()+', '+td.getFullYear()+'</div></div>';
      var circ=2*Math.PI*22,col=done===total?'#B8860B':'#2D6A4F';
      h+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px"><svg width="46" height="46" viewBox="0 0 52 52"><circle cx="26" cy="26" r="22" fill="none" stroke="#e0dbd2" stroke-width="4"/><circle cx="26" cy="26" r="22" fill="none" stroke="'+col+'" stroke-width="4" stroke-dasharray="'+circ+'" stroke-dashoffset="'+circ*(1-pct/100)+'" stroke-linecap="round" transform="rotate(-90 26 26)"/></svg><div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--green)">'+done+'/'+total+'</div></div></div>';
      h+='<div class="habits-list">';
      S.data.habits.forEach(function(hab){
      var ck=comp.indexOf(hab.id)!==-1,cat=CATS.find(function(c){return c.id===hab.category;})||CATS[6];
      var flbl=!hab.freq||hab.freq==='daily'?'':hab.freq==='days'?(hab.freqDays||[]).map(function(d){return DS[d];}).join(', '):hab.freq==='weekly'?(hab.freqPerWeek||1)+'x/wk':'';
      h+='<div class="habit-card'+(ck?' checked':'')+'" id="card-'+hab.id+'"><div class="hc" onclick="th(\''+hab.id+'\')"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"/></svg></div>';
      h+='<div style="flex:1" onclick="th(\''+hab.id+'\')"><div class="hn">'+e(hab.name)+(flbl?' <span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:400;color:var(--text-muted)">'+flbl+'</span>':'')+'</div>';
      if(hab.desc)h+='<div class="hd">'+e(hab.desc)+'</div>';
      h+='</div><span class="hcat '+cat.c+'">'+cat.l+'</span>';
      h+='<div class="hact"><button class="abtn" onclick="oem(\''+hab.id+'\')" title="Edit"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M11 4H4a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v14a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h14a2 2 0 0 0 2-2v-7"/><path d="M18.5 2.5a2.121 2.121 0 0 1 3 3L12 15l-4 1 1-4 9.5-9.5z"/></svg></button>';
      h+='<button class="abtn del" onclick="dh(\''+hab.id+'\')" title="Delete"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><polyline points="3 6 5 6 21 6"/><path d="M19 6v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H7a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6m3 0V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h4a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v2"/></svg></button></div></div>';
      });
      h+='</div><button class="add-btn" onclick="oam()"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"/><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"/></svg> Add a habit</button>';
      // Weekly view
      h+='<h3 style="font-family:\'DM Serif Display\',serif;font-size:17px;color:var(--green);margin:24px 0 12px">This Week</h3>';
      var dates=wd();
      h+='<div class="week-grid"><div class="whr"><div class="whc">Habit</div>';
      ['Mon','Tue','Wed','Thu','Fri','Sat','Sun'].forEach(function(l,i){var d=dk(dates[i]);h+='<div class="whc'+(d===ts?' tc':'')+'">'+l+'<br><span style="font-weight:400;font-size:9px">'+dates[i].getDate()+'</span></div>';});
      h+='</div>';
      S.data.habits.forEach(function(hab){h+='<div class="wr"><div class="whn">'+e(hab.name)+'</div>';
      dates.forEach(function(d){var k=dk(d),fl=S.data.completions[k]&&S.data.completions[k].indexOf(hab.id)!==-1,fu=d>td&&k!==ts;
      h+='<div class="wc'+(k===ts?' tc':'')+'"><div class="wd'+(fl?' f':'')+(fu?' fu':'')+'"';
      if(!fu)h+=' onclick="thd(\''+hab.id+'\',\''+k+'\')"';
      h+='>'+(fl?'<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"><polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"/></svg>':'')+'</div></div>';
      });h+='</div>';});
      h+='</div>';
      return h;
      }
      // JOURNAL (was Notes)
      function rJournal(ts){
      if(!S.data.notes)S.data.notes={};var tn=S.data.notes[ts]||'';
      var nd=Object.keys(S.data.notes).filter(function(k){return S.data.notes[k]&&S.data.notes[k].trim();}).sort(function(a,b){return b.localeCompare(a);});
      var past=nd.filter(function(k){return k!==ts;});
      var h='<h2 style="font-family:\'DM Serif Display\',serif;font-size:24px;color:var(--green);margin-bottom:4px">Journal</h2><div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:16px">Reflections, observations, things to bring to your next session.</div>';
      h+='<div class="card"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:8px"><span class="fl" style="margin:0">Today</span><span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted)">'+fs(ts)+'</span></div>';
      h+='<textarea class="ft" style="min-height:120px;font-size:13px;line-height:1.7" placeholder="What came up today? What did you notice?" oninput="sn(\''+ts+'\',this.value)">'+e(tn)+'</textarea></div>';
      if(past.length>0){h+='<h3 style="font-family:\'DM Serif Display\',serif;font-size:16px;color:var(--green);margin:6px 0 10px">Previous</h3>';
      past.forEach(function(k){h+='<div class="card"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:4px"><span style="font-weight:600;font-size:12px;color:var(--green)">'+fs(k)+'</span><button class="abtn del" onclick="dn(\''+k+'\')" style="opacity:1"><svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><polyline points="3 6 5 6 21 6"/><path d="M19 6v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H7a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6m3 0V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h4a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v2"/></svg></button></div><div style="font-size:13px;line-height:1.6;white-space:pre-wrap">'+e(S.data.notes[k])+'</div></div>';});}
      else{h+='<div style="text-align:center;padding:24px;color:var(--text-muted);font-size:12px">Your entries will show up here as you write them.</div>';}
      return h;
      }
      // PROGRESS
      function rProgress(td,data){
      var habits=data.habits;if(habits.length===0)return '<div class="empty"><div class="ei">📊</div><h3>No data yet</h3></div>';
      var ad=Math.min(90,adays(data)),days=[];for(var i=ad-1;i>=0;i--){var d=new Date(td);d.setDate(d.getDate()-i);days.push(dk(d));}
      var totalDue=0,totalDone=0,pd=0;
      days.forEach(function(k){var c=data.completions[k]||[];var dueH=habits.filter(function(h){return hdueDk(h,k);});var doneH=dueH.filter(function(h){return c.indexOf(h.id)!==-1;});if(dueH.length>0&&doneH.length===dueH.length)pd++;});
      habits.forEach(function(h){var due=hdueCount(h,days);totalDue+=due;var done=0;days.forEach(function(k){var c=data.completions[k]||[];if(c.indexOf(h.id)!==-1)done++;});totalDone+=Math.min(done,due);});
      var ar=totalDue>0?Math.round((totalDone/totalDue)*100):0,sk=streak(data);
      var hr=habits.map(function(hb){var due=hdueCount(hb,days);var c=0;days.forEach(function(k){var co=data.completions[k]||[];if(co.indexOf(hb.id)!==-1)c++;});var freq=!hb.freq||hb.freq==='daily'?'Daily':hb.freq==='days'?(hb.freqDays||[]).length+'x/wk':hb.freq==='weekly'?(hb.freqPerWeek||1)+'x/wk':'Daily';return{name:hb.name,category:hb.category,rate:due>0?Math.round((Math.min(c,due)/due)*100):0,freq:freq};}).sort(function(a,b){return b.rate-a.rate;});
      var h='<h2 style="font-family:\'DM Serif Display\',serif;font-size:24px;color:var(--green);margin-bottom:4px">Progress</h2><div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:16px">Last '+ad+' day'+(ad!==1?'s':'')+'</div>';
      // Engagement bar
      if(data.startDate){var epv=ep(data);
      h+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:10px 16px;margin-bottom:14px;font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted)">';
      h+='<span>Engagement</span><strong style="color:var(--text);font-size:12px">'+fd(data.startDate);
      if(data.endDate)h+=' – '+fd(data.endDate);
      h+='</strong>';
      if(epv!==null){h+='<div style="flex:1;max-width:100px;background:var(--cream-light);border-radius:4px;height:5px;overflow:hidden"><div style="height:100%;background:'+(epv>=100?'var(--gold)':'var(--check-green)')+';border-radius:4px;width:'+epv+'%"></div></div><span>'+epv+'%</span>';}
      h+='</div>';
      }
      h+='<div class="stats-grid"><div class="stat-card"><div class="sv" style="color:'+(ar>=70?'var(--check-green)':ar>=40?'var(--gold)':'#c0392b')+'">'+ar+'%</div><div class="sl">Completion Rate</div></div>';
      h+='<div class="stat-card"><div class="sv">'+sk+'</div><div class="sl">Day Streak</div></div>';
      h+='<div class="stat-card"><div class="sv">'+pd+'</div><div class="sl">Perfect Days</div></div></div>';
      // Goals progress (above habits)
      var goals=data.goals||[];
      if(goals.length>0){
      var activeGoals=goals.filter(function(g){return g.status!=='inactive';});
      var inactiveGoals=goals.filter(function(g){return g.status==='inactive';});
      if(activeGoals.length>0){
      h+='<h3 style="font-family:\'DM Serif Display\',serif;font-size:16px;color:var(--green);margin:20px 0 10px">Goal Progress</h3>';
      activeGoals.forEach(function(g){
      var pct=g.progress||0,bc2=pct>=70?'var(--check-green)':pct>=40?'var(--gold)':'var(--green-muted)';
      h+='<div class="card" style="margin-bottom:8px"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:4px"><span style="font-weight:600;font-size:13px;color:var(--green)">'+e(g.title)+'</span><span class="goal-status gs-'+g.status+'" style="font-size:9px">'+g.status+'</span></div>';
      if(g.outcome)h+='<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:6px">'+e(g.outcome)+'</div>';
      h+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px"><div style="flex:1;background:var(--cream-light);border-radius:4px;height:6px;overflow:hidden"><div style="height:100%;border-radius:4px;width:'+pct+'%;background:'+bc2+'"></div></div><span style="font-weight:700;color:var(--green);font-size:13px">'+pct+'%</span></div></div>';
      });
      }
      if(inactiveGoals.length>0){
      h+='<h3 style="font-family:\'DM Serif Display\',serif;font-size:16px;color:var(--text-muted);margin:20px 0 10px">Inactive Goals</h3>';
      inactiveGoals.forEach(function(g){
      var pct=g.progress||0;
      h+='<div class="card" style="margin-bottom:8px;opacity:0.6"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:4px"><span style="font-weight:600;font-size:13px;color:var(--text-muted)">'+e(g.title)+'</span><span class="goal-status gs-inactive" style="font-size:9px">inactive</span></div>';
      if(g.outcome)h+='<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:6px">'+e(g.outcome)+'</div>';
      h+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px"><div style="flex:1;background:var(--cream-light);border-radius:4px;height:6px;overflow:hidden"><div style="height:100%;border-radius:4px;width:'+pct+'%;background:#ccc"></div></div><span style="font-weight:700;color:var(--text-muted);font-size:13px">'+pct+'%</span></div></div>';
      });
      }
      }
      h+='<h3 style="font-family:\'DM Serif Display\',serif;font-size:16px;color:var(--green);margin:20px 0 10px">By Habit</h3>';
      hr.forEach(function(r){var cat=CATS.find(function(c){return c.id===r.category;})||CATS[6];var bc=r.rate>=70?'var(--check-green)':r.rate>=40?'var(--gold)':'#c0392b';
      h+='<div class="card" style="margin-bottom:8px"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:6px"><div><span style="font-weight:600;font-size:13px">'+e(r.name)+'</span><span class="hcat '+cat.c+'" style="margin-left:6px">'+cat.l+'</span><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-left:6px">'+r.freq+'</span></div><span style="font-weight:700;color:var(--green);font-size:13px">'+r.rate+'%</span></div><div style="background:var(--cream-light);border-radius:4px;height:6px;overflow:hidden"><div style="background:'+bc+';height:100%;width:'+r.rate+'%;border-radius:4px"></div></div></div>';
      });
      return h;
      }
      // DOCUMENTS
      var RB='https://scalingminds.github.io/client-portal/';
      var RESOURCES=[
      {id:'r1',title:'Reactive vs. Responsive',desc:'Understand the difference between reacting on impulse and responding with intention. This brief explores the neuroscience behind reactivity and offers a practical framework for making the shift.',category:'Cognitive & Behavioral',series:'Leadership Insight Series',link:RB+'reactive-vs-responsive.pdf'},
      {id:'r2',title:'Perception vs. Perspective',desc:'How the stories we tell ourselves shape what we see. This brief introduces the distinction between automatic perception and intentional perspective-taking as a leadership skill.',category:'Emotional Intelligence',series:'Leadership Insight Series',link:RB+'perception-vs-perspective.pdf'},
      {id:'r3',title:"Don't Believe Everything You Think",desc:'Four questions that challenge automatic thought patterns. Based on cognitive behavioral principles, this tool helps leaders interrupt unhelpful thinking before it drives behavior.',category:'Cognitive & Behavioral',series:'Leadership Insight Series',link:RB+'four-questions.pdf'},
      {id:'r4',title:"What Got You Here Won't Get You There",desc:'Every leadership transition asks for something different. The behaviors that drove success at one level can undermine effectiveness at the next. Not because they were wrong. Because the job changed.',category:'Identity & Role',series:'Leadership Insight Series',link:RB+'what-got-you-here.pdf'},
      {id:'r5',title:'Playing to Win vs. Playing Not to Lose',desc:'Two fundamentally different orientations. Playing to win means making decisions from possibility. Playing not to lose means making decisions from fear. Over time, they produce very different results.',category:'Identity & Role',series:'Leadership Insight Series',link:RB+'playing-to-win.pdf'},
      {id:'r6',title:'The Loneliness of Leadership',desc:'Senior leaders are among the most isolated people in organizational life. Surrounded by people and starved of honesty. This brief names the pattern and what to do about it.',category:'Emotional Intelligence',series:'Leadership Insight Series',link:RB+'loneliness-of-leadership.pdf'},
      {id:'r7',title:'Agreements vs. Expectations',desc:'An expectation lives in your head. An agreement lives between two people.
