Most accountability breakdowns are failures of agreement, not follow-through.',category:'Leadership Execution',series:'Leadership Insight Series',link:RB+'agreements-vs-expectations.pdf'},
      {id:'r8',title:'Burnout vs. Stress',desc:'Burnout is not a problem of too much. It is a problem of too little. Too little meaning, too little recovery, too little sense that the work still matters. This brief helps you tell the difference.',category:'Wellbeing & Sustainability',series:'Leadership Insight Series',link:RB+'burnout-vs-stress.pdf'},
      {id:'r9',title:'Micromanagement: The Psychology Behind It',desc:'The need to control is almost always a response to anxiety. This brief explores the three common roots of micromanagement and what it actually costs.',category:'Leadership Execution',series:'Leadership Insight Series',link:RB+'micromanagement.pdf'},
      {id:'r10',title:'People-Pleasing in Leaders',desc:'The kindest thing a leader can do is tell the truth. This brief explores the difference between serving and pleasing, and why the pattern undermines the trust it tries to protect.',category:'Identity & Role',series:'Leadership Insight Series',link:RB+'people-pleasing.pdf'},
      {id:'r11',title:'The Accountability Gap',desc:'The distance between what a leader says they expect and what they actually tolerate. Every team has one. Most leaders don\'t know theirs exists.',category:'Leadership Execution',series:'Leadership Insight Series',link:RB+'accountability-gap.pdf'},
      {id:'r12',title:'Intention vs. Impact',desc:'Intent and impact are two different conversations. Conflating them is one of the most reliable ways to make a hard conversation harder.',category:'Relational & Interpersonal',series:'Leadership Insight Series',link:RB+'intention-vs-impact.pdf'},
      {id:'r13',title:'The Expert Trap',desc:'What happens when a leader\'s identity stays fused with being the most capable person in the room. The skills that get you to the top are not always the skills that make you effective once you\'re there.',category:'Identity & Role',series:'Leadership Insight Series',link:RB+'expert-trap.pdf'},
      {id:'r14',title:'Imposter Syndrome',desc:'The persistent feeling that you don\'t deserve to be here and it\'s only a matter of time before someone notices. This brief separates the feeling from the evidence.',category:'Emotional Intelligence',series:'Leadership Insight Series',link:RB+'imposter-syndrome.pdf'},
      {id:'r15',title:'Emotional Regulation Under Pressure',desc:'You don\'t get to choose what you feel but you do get to choose what you do with it. This brief covers the window of tolerance and why reappraisal works better than suppression.',category:'Emotional Intelligence',series:'Leadership Insight Series',link:RB+'emotional-regulation.pdf'},
      {id:'r16',title:'Feedback vs. Criticism',desc:'Feedback is about the work. Criticism is about the person. The difference sounds small. The impact isn\'t. This brief shows how to keep them separate.',category:'Relational & Interpersonal',series:'Leadership Insight Series',link:RB+'feedback-vs-criticism.pdf'},
      {id:'r17',title:'Decision Fatigue',desc:'You make your worst decisions at the end of a full day. Not because you care less but because your brain has less left to work with.',category:'Cognitive & Behavioral',series:'Leadership Insight Series',link:RB+'decision-fatigue.pdf'},
      {id:'r18',title:'Psychological Safety',desc:'A shared belief that the team is safe for interpersonal risk-taking. Not niceness. Not comfort. The ability to be direct, raise concerns, and challenge assumptions without fear.',category:'Teams & Culture',series:'Leadership Insight Series',link:RB+'psychological-safety.pdf'},
      {id:'r19',title:'Vulnerability as a Leadership Tool',desc:'Vulnerability in leadership is not oversharing. It\'s the willingness to be seen honestly. To say I don\'t know, to acknowledge a mistake, to show uncertainty without pretending it isn\'t there.',category:'Emotional Intelligence',series:'Leadership Insight Series',link:RB+'vulnerability-leadership.pdf'}
      ];
      var _rPreview=null;
      function rDocs(data){
      var docs=data.docs||[],lib=S.lib||[];
      var h='<h2 style="font-family:\'DM Serif Display\',serif;font-size:24px;color:var(--green);margin-bottom:4px">Documents & Resources</h2><div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:24px">Resources, handouts, and materials for your coaching engagement.</div>';
      // 1. Personal docs first
      if(docs.length>0){
      h+='<div style="margin-bottom:28px">';
      h+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:14px"><div style="width:4px;height:22px;background:var(--gold);border-radius:2px"></div><div style="font-family:\'DM Serif Display\',serif;font-size:18px;color:var(--green)">Your Documents</div></div>';
      var cats={};docs.forEach(function(d){var c=d.category||'General';if(!cats[c])cats[c]=[];cats[c].push(d);});
      Object.keys(cats).sort().forEach(function(cat){
      h+='<div style="margin-bottom:12px"><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:6px">'+e(cat)+'</div>';
      cats[cat].forEach(function(d){
      h+='<a href="'+e(d.link)+'" target="_blank" style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:12px;background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-left:3px solid var(--gold);border-radius:10px;padding:12px 16px;text-decoration:none;margin-bottom:6px">';
      h+='<div style="flex:1"><div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--green)">'+e(d.title)+'</div>';
      if(d.desc)h+='<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:1px">'+e(d.desc)+'</div>';
      h+='</div></a>';
      });h+='</div>';
      });
      h+='</div>';
      }
      // 2. Firebase Resource Library (coach-managed)
      if(lib.length>0){
      h+='<div style="margin-bottom:28px">';
      h+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:14px"><div style="width:4px;height:22px;background:var(--green-muted);border-radius:2px"></div><div style="font-family:\'DM Serif Display\',serif;font-size:18px;color:var(--green)">Resource Library</div></div>';
      lib.forEach(function(d){
      h+='<a href="'+e(d.link)+'" target="_blank" class="rlink" style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:12px;background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:12px 16px;text-decoration:none;margin-bottom:6px">';
      h+='<svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--green)" stroke-width="2" style="margin-top:2px;min-width:16px"><path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z"/><polyline points="14 2 14 8 20 8"/></svg>';
      h+='<div style="flex:1"><div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--green)">'+e(d.title)+'</div>';
      if(d.desc)h+='<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:1px">'+e(d.desc)+'</div>';
      h+='</div><span style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:3px;background:var(--cream-light);color:var(--text-muted);white-space:nowrap;margin-top:2px">'+e(d.category||'General')+'</span></a>';
      });
      h+='</div>';
      }
      // 3. Leadership Insight Series - featured cards + browse all
      var featured=RESOURCES.slice(0,4);
      var showAll=S._showAllRes||false;
      h+='<div style="margin-bottom:32px">';
      h+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:16px"><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px"><div style="width:4px;height:22px;background:var(--gold);border-radius:2px"></div><div><div style="font-family:\'DM Serif Display\',serif;font-size:18px;color:var(--green)">Leadership Insight Series</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted)">'+RESOURCES.length+' research-backed briefs for leaders</div></div></div></div>';
      h+='<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(220px,1fr));gap:14px">';
      var toShow=showAll?RESOURCES:featured;
      toShow.forEach(function(r){
      h+='<div class="rcard" onclick="showRes(\''+r.id+'\')">';
      h+='<div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1B4332 0%,#2D6A4F 100%);padding:24px 20px;position:relative;overflow:hidden">';
      h+='<div style="position:absolute;top:-10px;right:-10px;width:60px;height:60px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(184,134,11,0.15)"></div>';
      h+='<div style="position:absolute;bottom:-20px;left:-10px;width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(184,134,11,0.1)"></div>';
      h+='<div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1.2px;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:8px">Leadership Insight</div>';
      h+='<div style="font-family:\'DM Serif Display\',serif;font-size:16px;color:var(--cream-light);line-height:1.3">'+e(r.title)+'</div>';
      h+='</div>';
      h+='<div style="padding:14px 16px"><div style="display:inline-block;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:4px;background:var(--cream-light);color:var(--green-muted)">'+e(r.category)+'</div></div>';
      h+='</div>';
      });
      h+='</div>';
      if(!showAll&&RESOURCES.length>4){
      h+='<div style="text-align:center;margin-top:16px"><button onclick="S._showAllRes=true;R();" style="background:none;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:10px 24px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--green);cursor:pointer;font-family:\'DM Sans\',sans-serif;transition:all 0.2s" onmouseover="this.style.background=\'var(--cream-light)\'" onmouseout="this.style.background=\'none\'">Browse All '+RESOURCES.length+' Briefs</button></div>';
      } else if(showAll&&RESOURCES.length>4){
      h+='<div style="text-align:center;margin-top:16px"><button onclick="S._showAllRes=false;R();" style="background:none;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:10px 24px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;font-family:\'DM Sans\',sans-serif;transition:all 0.2s" onmouseover="this.style.background=\'var(--cream-light)\'" onmouseout="this.style.background=\'none\'">Show Less</button></div>';
      }
      h+='</div>';
      if(docs.length===0&&lib.length===0&&RESOURCES.length===0)h+='<div class="empty"><div class="ei">📄</div><h3>No documents yet</h3><p>Your coach will share resources here.</p></div>';
      // Resource preview modal
      if(_rPreview){
      var r=RESOURCES.find(function(x){return x.id===_rPreview;});
      if(r){
      h+='<div style="position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(27,67,50,0.5);backdrop-filter:blur(4px);z-index:300;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:20px" onclick="closeRes()">';
      h+='<div style="background:var(--white);border-radius:16px;max-width:480px;width:100%;box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(27,67,50,0.2);overflow:hidden" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">';
      h+='<div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1B4332 0%,#2D6A4F 100%);padding:28px 24px;position:relative;overflow:hidden">';
      h+='<div style="position:absolute;top:-15px;right:-15px;width:80px;height:80px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(184,134,11,0.15)"></div>';
      h+='<div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1.2px;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:8px">'+e(r.series)+'</div>';
      h+='<div style="font-family:\'DM Serif Display\',serif;font-size:22px;color:var(--cream-light);line-height:1.3;margin-bottom:6px">'+e(r.title)+'</div>';
      h+='<div style="display:inline-block;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:4px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);color:var(--cream)">'+e(r.category)+'</div>';
      h+='</div>';
      h+='<div style="padding:24px"><div style="font-size:14px;line-height:1.7;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:20px">'+e(r.desc)+'</div>';
      h+='<div style="display:flex;gap:10px"><a href="'+e(r.link)+'" target="_blank" style="flex:1;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px;padding:14px;background:var(--green);color:var(--cream-light);border-radius:10px;text-decoration:none;font-weight:600;font-size:14px;font-family:\'DM Sans\',sans-serif"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M18 13v6a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h6"/><polyline points="15 3 21 3 21 9"/><line x1="10" y1="14" x2="21" y2="3"/></svg>Open Resource</a>';
      h+='<button onclick="closeRes()" style="padding:14px 20px;background:var(--cream-light);border:none;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;font-family:\'DM Sans\',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text)">Close</button></div>';
      h+='</div></div></div>';
      }
      }
      return h;
      }
      function showRes(id){_rPreview=id;R();}
      function closeRes(){_rPreview=null;R();}
      // MODAL
      function rModal(){
      if(!S.mo)return '';var hab=S.eh?S.data.habits.find(function(x){return x.id===S.eh;}):null;
      var freq=hab?hab.freq||'daily':'daily',freqDays=hab?hab.freqDays||[]:[],freqPW=hab?hab.freqPerWeek||1:1;
      var h='<div class="mh"><h3>'+(hab?'Edit Habit':'Add a Habit')+'</h3><button class="mx" onclick="cm()">&times;</button></div><div class="mb">';
      h+='<div class="fg"><label class="fl">Habit Name</label><input class="fi" id="hn" type="text" placeholder="e.g., 30 min exercise, Give direct feedback" value="'+(hab?e(hab.name):'')+'"></div>';
      h+='<div class="fg"><label class="fl">Description (optional)</label><textarea class="ft" id="hd" placeholder="Why does this matter?">'+(hab?e(hab.desc||''):'')+'</textarea></div>';
      h+='<div class="fg"><label class="fl">Category</label><select class="fs" id="hcat">';
      CATS.forEach(function(c){h+='<option value="'+c.id+'"'+(hab&&hab.category===c.id?' selected':'')+'>'+c.l+'</option>';});
      h+='</select></div>';
      // Frequency
      h+='<div class="fg"><label class="fl">Frequency</label><select class="fs" id="hfreq" onchange="ufm()"><option value="daily"'+(freq==='daily'?' selected':'')+'>Every day</option><option value="days"'+(freq==='days'?' selected':'')+'>Specific days</option><option value="weekly"'+(freq==='weekly'?' selected':'')+'>X times per week</option></select></div>';
      h+='<div id="freq-days" style="display:'+(freq==='days'?'block':'none')+';margin-bottom:16px"><label class="fl">Which days?</label><div style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap">';
      ['Sun','Mon','Tue','Wed','Thu','Fri','Sat'].forEach(function(d,i){
      var sel=freqDays.indexOf(i)!==-1;
      h+='<div onclick="tfd('+i+')" id="fd'+i+'" style="padding:8px 14px;border-radius:8px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;border:2px solid '+(sel?'var(--check-green)':'var(--border)')+';background:'+(sel?'rgba(45,106,79,0.1)':'var(--white)')+';color:'+(sel?'var(--green)':'var(--text-muted)')+'">'+d+'</div>';
      });
      h+='</div></div>';
      h+='<div id="freq-weekly" style="display:'+(freq==='weekly'?'block':'none')+';margin-bottom:16px"><label class="fl">How many times per week?</label><select class="fs" id="hfpw">';
      for(var i=1;i<=6;i++){h+='<option value="'+i+'"'+(freqPW===i?' selected':'')+'>'+i+'x per week</option>';}
      h+='</select></div>';
      h+='<div class="fa"><button class="btn bs" onclick="cm()">Cancel</button><button class="btn bp" onclick="sh()">'+(hab?'Save':'Add')+'</button></div></div>';
      return h;
      }
      var _fdSel=[];
      function ufm(){var v=document.getElementById('hfreq').value;document.getElementById('freq-days').style.display=v==='days'?'block':'none';document.getElementById('freq-weekly').style.display=v==='weekly'?'block':'none';}
      function tfd(i){var ix=_fdSel.indexOf(i);if(ix===-1)_fdSel.push(i);else _fdSel.splice(ix,1);var el=document.getElementById('fd'+i);if(_fdSel.indexOf(i)!==-1){el.style.borderColor='var(--check-green)';el.style.background='rgba(45,106,79,0.1)';el.style.color='var(--green)';}else{el.style.borderColor='var(--border)';el.style.background='var(--white)';el.style.color='var(--text-muted)';}}
      // ══════════════════════════════════
      // COACH DASHBOARD
      // ══════════════════════════════════
      function rCA(){
      var app=document.getElementById('app'),h='';
      h+='<div class="header"><div class="header-left"><img class="header-logo" src="'+L+'" alt="SM"><div><h1>Coach Dashboard</h1><div class="header-subtitle">'+e(S.user.displayName||'')+' &middot; '+S.cls.length+' client'+(S.cls.length!==1?'s':'')+'</div></div></div>';
      h+='<div class="header-right"><button class="signout-btn" onclick="so()">Sign out</button></div></div>';
      h+='<div class="nav-bar"><div class="nav-tab'+(S.cv==='clients'?' active':'')+'" onclick="scv(\'clients\')">All Clients</div>';
      h+='<div class="nav-tab'+(S.cv==='library'?' active':'')+'" onclick="scv(\'library\')">Resource Library</div>';
      if(S.sc)h+='<div class="nav-tab'+(S.cv==='detail'?' active':'')+'" onclick="scv(\'detail\')">'+e(S.sc.displayName)+'</div>';
      h+='</div><div class="main">';
      if(S.cv==='clients')h+=rCL();
      else if(S.cv==='library')h+=rLib();
      else if(S.cv==='detail'&&S.sc)h+=rCD();
      h+='</div><div class="footer">&copy; Scaling Minds &middot; Coach Dashboard</div>';
      app.innerHTML=h;
      }
      function rCL(){
      var h='<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:4px"><h2 style="font-family:\'DM Serif Display\',serif;font-size:24px;color:var(--green)">Your Clients</h2>';
      h+='<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center"><label style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;cursor:pointer"><input type="checkbox" id="grp-co" onchange="S._grpCo=this.checked;R()"'+(S._grpCo?' checked':'')+'> Group by company</label><label style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;cursor:pointer"><input type="checkbox" id="show-arch" onchange="R()"'+(S._showArch?' checked':'')+'> Archived</label><button class="exp" onclick="eacsv()">Export</button><button class="btn bs" onclick="ref()">Refresh</button></div></div>';
      S._showArch=document.getElementById('show-arch')&&document.getElementById('show-arch').checked;
      var active=S.cls.filter(function(c){return !c.archived;});
      var archived=S.cls.filter(function(c){return c.archived;});
      var list=S._showArch?S.cls:active;
      if(list.length===0)return h+'<div class="empty"><div class="ei">👥</div><h3>No clients yet</h3></div>';
      var sorted=list.slice().sort(function(a,b){if(a.archived!==b.archived)return a.archived?1:-1;var ai=ds(la(a))>=ID?0:1,bi=ds(la(b))>=ID?0:1;if(ai!==bi)return ai-bi;return(a.displayName||'').localeCompare(b.displayName||'');});
      if(S._grpCo){
      var groups={};sorted.forEach(function(c){var co=c.company||'No Company';if(!groups[co])groups[co]=[];groups[co].push(c);});
      var gkeys=Object.keys(groups).sort(function(a,b){if(a==='No Company')return 1;if(b==='No Company')return -1;return a.localeCompare(b);});
      gkeys.forEach(function(co){
      h+='<div style="margin-bottom:20px"><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px;color:var(--green-muted);margin-bottom:8px;padding-bottom:4px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)">'+e(co)+' <span style="font-weight:400;color:var(--text-muted)">('+groups[co].length+')</span></div>';
      h+='<div class="client-grid">';
      groups[co].forEach(function(c){var r=crate(c),sk=streak(c),lv=la(c),ina=ds(lv)>=ID;
      h+='<div class="cc'+(ina&&!c.archived?' inactive':'')+(c.archived?' inactive':'')+'" onclick="selByUid(\''+c.uid+'\')" style="'+(c.archived?'opacity:0.6':'')+'">';
      h+='<div class="ct">';if(c.photoURL)h+='<img class="ca" src="'+c.photoURL+'" alt="">';
      h+='<div><div class="cn">'+e(c.displayName)+(c.archived?'<span class="itag" style="background:var(--cream-light);color:var(--text-muted)">Archived</span>':ina?'<span class="itag">'+ds(lv)+'d inactive</span>':'')+'</div>';
      h+='<div class="ce">'+e(c.email)+(c.title?' &middot; '+e(c.title):'')+'</div></div></div>';
      h+='<div class="cstats"><div><span class="csv">'+r+'%</span>rate</div><div><span class="csv">'+sk+'</span>streak</div><div><span class="csv">'+c.habits.length+'</span>habits</div><div><span class="csv">'+(lv||'\u2014')+'</span>last</div></div></div>';
      });h+='</div></div>';
      });
      } else {
      h+='<div class="client-grid">';
      sorted.forEach(function(c,i){var r=crate(c),sk=streak(c),lv=la(c),ina=ds(lv)>=ID;
      h+='<div class="cc'+(ina&&!c.archived?' inactive':'')+(c.archived?' inactive':'')+'" onclick="selByUid(\''+c.uid+'\')" style="'+(c.archived?'opacity:0.6':'')+'">';
      h+='<div class="ct">';if(c.photoURL)h+='<img class="ca" src="'+c.photoURL+'" alt="">';
      h+='<div><div class="cn">'+e(c.displayName)+(c.archived?'<span class="itag" style="background:var(--cream-light);color:var(--text-muted)">Archived</span>':ina?'<span class="itag">'+ds(lv)+'d inactive</span>':'')+'</div>';
      h+='<div class="ce">'+e(c.email)+(c.company?' &middot; '+e(c.company):'')+'</div></div></div>';
      h+='<div class="cstats"><div><span class="csv">'+r+'%</span>rate</div><div><span class="csv">'+sk+'</span>streak</div><div><span class="csv">'+c.habits.length+'</span>habits</div><div><span class="csv">'+(lv||'\u2014')+'</span>last</div></div></div>';
      });h+='</div>';
      }
      if(!S._showArch&&archived.length>0)h+='<div style="text-align:center;margin-top:12px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted)">'+archived.length+' archived client'+(archived.length!==1?'s':'')+' hidden</div>';
      return h;
      }
      function rCD(){
      var c=S.sc,td=new Date();
      var h='<button class="back" onclick="scv(\'clients\')"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><polyline points="15 18 9 12 15 6"/></svg> All Clients</button>';
      h+='<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:20px"><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px">';
      if(c.photoURL)h+='<img style="width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid var(--gold)" src="'+c.photoURL+'" alt="">';
      h+='<div><h2 style="font-family:\'DM Serif Display\',serif;font-size:24px;color:var(--green)">'+e(c.displayName)+'</h2><div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted)">'+e(c.email)+'</div></div></div>';
      h+='<button class="exp" onclick="eccsv()">Export CSV</button></div>';
      // Name edit
      h+='<div class="card"><h3>Client Name</h3><div style="display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-end;flex-wrap:wrap"><div class="fg" style="margin:0;flex:1;min-width:200px"><input class="fi" id="cnm" type="text" value="'+e(c.displayName)+'" placeholder="Client name"></div><button class="btn bp" onclick="scnm()">Save</button></div>';
      // Contact info
      var ci=[];
      if(c.company||c.title)ci.push((c.title||'')+(c.title&&c.company?' at ':'')+(c.company||''));
      if(c.phone)ci.push(c.phone);if(c.birthday)ci.push('Birthday: '+c.birthday);if(c.address)ci.push(c.address);
      if(ci.length>0)h+='<div style="margin-top:10px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted);line-height:1.8">'+ci.map(function(x){return e(x);}).join('<br>')+'</div>';
      h+='<div style="margin-top:12px;display:flex;gap:8px"><button class="btn bs" style="font-size:11px;padding:6px 14px" onclick="archClient()">'+( c.archived?'Unarchive':'Archive')+'</button><button class="btn bs" style="font-size:11px;padding:6px 14px;color:#c0392b" onclick="delClient()">Delete</button></div>';
      h+='</div>';
      // Dates
      h+='<div class="card"><h3>Engagement</h3><div style="display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-end;flex-wrap:wrap"><div class="fg" style="margin:0;flex:1;min-width:140px"><label class="fl">Start</label><input class="fi" type="date" id="cs" value="'+(c.startDate||'')+'"></div><div class="fg" style="margin:0;flex:1;min-width:140px"><label class="fl">End</label><input class="fi" type="date" id="ce2" value="'+(c.endDate||'')+'"></div><button class="btn bp" onclick="scd()">Save</button></div></div>';
      // Next session
      h+='<div class="card"><h3>Next Session</h3><div style="display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-end;flex-wrap:wrap"><div class="fg" style="margin:0;flex:1;min-width:180px"><input class="fi" type="datetime-local" id="cns" step="900" value="'+(c.nextSession||'')+'"></div><button class="btn bp" onclick="scns()">Save</button></div>';
      h+='<div style="margin-top:10px"><div class="fg" style="margin:0"><label class="fl">Custom Calendly URL (optional)</label><div style="display:flex;gap:8px"><input class="fi" id="ccal" type="url" placeholder="https://calendly.com/..." value="'+e(c.calendlyUrl||'')+'"><button class="btn bp" onclick="sccal()">Save</button></div></div></div></div>';
      // Focus
      h+='<div class="card"><h3>Focus This Week</h3><textarea class="ft" id="cfw" placeholder="What should this client hold between sessions?">'+e(c.focusOfWeek||'')+'</textarea><div style="margin-top:8px;text-align:right"><button class="btn bp" onclick="scfw()">Save</button></div></div>';
      // Goals
      h+='<div class="card"><h3>Goals</h3>';
      var goals=c.goals||[];
      if(goals.length>0){goals.forEach(function(g,i){
      h+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--cream-light)">';
      h+='<div style="flex:1"><div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600">'+e(g.title)+'</div>';
      if(g.outcome)h+='<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted)">Target: '+e(g.outcome)+'</div>';
      h+='</div><select class="fs" style="width:auto;font-size:11px;padding:4px 8px" onchange="sgst('+i+',this.value)"><option value="active"'+(g.status==='active'?' selected':'')+'>Active</option><option value="completed"'+(g.status==='completed'?' selected':'')+'>Completed</option><option value="paused"'+(g.status==='paused'?' selected':'')+'>Paused</option><option value="inactive"'+(g.status==='inactive'?' selected':'')+'>Inactive</option></select>';
      h+='<button class="abtn del" onclick="rg('+i+')" style="opacity:1"><svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><polyline points="3 6 5 6 21 6"/><path d="M19 6v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H7a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6m3 0V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h4a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v2"/></svg></button></div>';
      });}
      h+='<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:flex-end">';
      h+='<div class="fg" style="margin:0;flex:2;min-width:160px"><label class="fl">Goal</label><input class="fi" id="ngt" placeholder="Build trust with VP team"></div>';
      h+='<div class="fg" style="margin:0;flex:1;min-width:140px"><label class="fl">Target Outcome</label><input class="fi" id="ngo" placeholder="Weekly 1:1s established"></div>';
      h+='<button class="btn bp" onclick="ag()">Add</button></div></div>';
      // Session Notes
      h+='<div class="card"><h3>Session Notes</h3>';
      var sn=(c.sessionNotes||[]).sort(function(a,b){return b.date.localeCompare(a.date);});
      if(sn.length>0){sn.forEach(function(s,i){
      h+='<div class="sn-card" style="margin:8px 0"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between"><div class="sn-date">'+fs(s.date)+'</div><button class="abtn del" onclick="rsn('+i+')" style="opacity:1"><svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><polyline points="3 6 5 6 21 6"/><path d="M19 6v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H7a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6m3 0V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h4a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v2"/></svg></button></div>';
      if(s.themes)h+='<div style="font-size:12px;margin-top:4px"><strong>Themes:</strong> '+e(s.themes)+'</div>';
      if(s.commitments)h+='<div style="font-size:12px"><strong>Commitments:</strong> '+e(s.commitments)+'</div>';
      if(s.experiments)h+='<div style="font-size:12px"><strong>Experiments:</strong> '+e(s.experiments)+'</div>';
      if(s.notes)h+='<div style="font-size:12px;white-space:pre-wrap">'+e(s.notes)+'</div>';
      h+='</div>';
      });}
      h+='<div style="margin-top:10px;padding-top:10px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)">';
      h+='<div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--green);margin-bottom:8px">Add Session Note</div>';
      h+='<div class="fg"><label class="fl">Date</label><input class="fi" type="date" id="snd" value="'+dk(td)+'"></div>';
      h+='<div class="fg"><label class="fl">Key Themes</label><input class="fi" id="snt" placeholder="Trust breakthrough, accountability gap..."></div>';
      h+='<div class="fg"><label class="fl">Commitments Made</label><input class="fi" id="snc" placeholder="Weekly 1:1 with VP, direct feedback to team"></div>';
      h+='<div class="fg"><label class="fl">Experiments to Try</label><input class="fi" id="sne" placeholder="Ask before directing this week"></div>';
      h+='<div class="fg"><label class="fl">Notes</label><textarea class="ft" id="snn" placeholder="Free-form session notes..."></textarea></div>';
      h+='<button class="btn bp" onclick="asn()">Add Note</button></div></div>';
      // Todos
      h+='<div class="card"><h3>To-Dos</h3>';
      var ct=c.todos||[];
      if(ct.length>0){ct.forEach(function(t,i){
      h+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:6px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--cream-light)">';
      h+='<div style="width:18px;height:18px;min-width:18px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid '+(t.done?'var(--check-green)':'var(--border)')+';background:'+(t.done?'var(--check-green)':'transparent')+';display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center">';
      if(t.done)h+='<svg width="9" height="9" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"><polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"/></svg>';
      h+='</div><div style="flex:1;font-size:12px;'+(t.done?'color:var(--green-muted);text-decoration:line-through':'')+'">'+e(t.text);
      if(t.link)h+=' <a href="'+e(t.link)+'" target="_blank" style="color:var(--green);font-size:11px">link</a>';
      h+='</div><button class="abtn del" onclick="rtd('+i+')" style="opacity:1"><svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><polyline points="3 6 5 6 21 6"/><path d="M19 6v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H7a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6m3 0V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h4a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v2"/></svg></button></div>';
      });}
      h+='<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:flex-end">';
      h+='<div class="fg" style="margin:0;flex:2;min-width:160px"><label class="fl">To-Do</label><input class="fi" id="ntt" placeholder="Read chapter 3"></div>';
      h+='<div class="fg" style="margin:0;flex:1;min-width:120px"><label class="fl">Link</label><input class="fi" id="ntl" type="url" placeholder="https://..."></div>';
      h+='<button class="btn bp" onclick="atd()">Add</button></div></div>';
      // Docs
      h+='<div class="card"><h3>Documents</h3>';
      var cd=c.docs||[];
      if(cd.length>0){cd.forEach(function(d,i){
      h+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:6px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--cream-light)">';
      h+='<div style="flex:1;font-size:12px"><strong>'+e(d.title)+'</strong> <span style="color:var(--text-muted)">('+e(d.category||'General')+')</span></div>';
      h+='<a href="'+e(d.link)+'" target="_blank" style="font-size:11px;color:var(--green)">open</a>';
      h+='<button class="abtn del" onclick="rdc('+i+')" style="opacity:1"><svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><polyline points="3 6 5 6 21 6"/><path d="M19 6v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H7a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6m3 0V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h4a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v2"/></svg></button></div>';
      });}
      h+='<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:flex-end">';
      h+='<div class="fg" style="margin:0;flex:2;min-width:120px"><label class="fl">Title</label><input class="fi" id="ndt" placeholder="Six Shifts Brief"></div>';
      h+='<div class="fg" style="margin:0;flex:2;min-width:120px"><label class="fl">Link</label><input class="fi" id="ndl" type="url" placeholder="https://..."></div>';
      h+='<div class="fg" style="margin:0;flex:1;min-width:100px"><label class="fl">Category</label><select class="fs" id="ndc"><option>Handouts</option><option>Assessments</option><option>Session Notes</option><option>Reading</option><option>Templates</option><option>General</option></select></div>';
      h+='<button class="btn bp" onclick="adc()">Add</button></div></div>';
      // Session prep from client
      if(c.sessionPrep){
      h+='<div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(184,134,11,0.06),rgba(184,134,11,0.02));border:1px solid rgba(184,134,11,0.3);border-radius:12px;padding:16px 20px;margin-bottom:14px">';
      h+='<h3 style="font-family:\'DM Serif Display\',serif;font-size:16px;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:6px">Session Prep (from client)</h3>';
      h+='<div style="font-size:13px;line-height:1.6;white-space:pre-wrap">'+e(c.sessionPrep)+'</div></div>';
      }
      // Client notes
      var nd=Object.keys(c.notes||{}).filter(function(k){return c.notes[k]&&c.notes[k].trim();}).sort(function(a,b){return b.localeCompare(a);});
      if(nd.length>0){
      h+='<div class="card"><h3>Client Journal</h3>';
      nd.slice(0,8).forEach(function(k){h+='<div style="padding:8px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--cream-light)"><div style="font-weight:600;font-size:11px;color:var(--green)">'+fs(k)+'</div><div style="font-size:12px;line-height:1.5;white-space:pre-wrap">'+e(c.notes[k])+'</div></div>';});
      h+='</div>';
      }
      return h;
      }
      // RESOURCE LIBRARY (coach)
      function rLib(){
      var lib=S.lib||[];
      var h='<h2 style="font-family:\'DM Serif Display\',serif;font-size:24px;color:var(--green);margin-bottom:4px">Resource Library</h2><div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:16px">Shared with all clients in their Documents tab.</div>';
      if(lib.length>0){
      var cats={};lib.forEach(function(d){var c=d.category||'General';if(!cats[c])cats[c]=[];cats[c].push(d);});
      Object.keys(cats).sort().forEach(function(cat){
      h+='<div style="margin-bottom:14px"><div class="card-label" style="margin-bottom:6px">'+e(cat)+'</div>';
      cats[cat].forEach(function(d,i2){
      var gi=lib.indexOf(d);
      h+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px 12px;background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:4px">';
      h+='<div style="flex:1"><div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600">'+e(d.title)+'</div>';
      if(d.desc)h+='<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted)">'+e(d.desc)+'</div>';
      h+='</div><a href="'+e(d.link)+'" target="_blank" style="font-size:11px;color:var(--green)">open</a>';
      h+='<button class="abtn del" onclick="rlb('+gi+')" style="opacity:1"><svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><polyline points="3 6 5 6 21 6"/><path d="M19 6v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H7a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6m3 0V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h4a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v2"/></svg></button></div>';
      });h+='</div>';
      });
      }
      h+='<div class="card" style="margin-top:14px"><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--green);margin-bottom:8px">Add Resource</div>';
      h+='<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:flex-end">';
      h+='<div class="fg" style="margin:0;flex:2;min-width:140px"><label class="fl">Title</label><input class="fi" id="lbt" placeholder="Six Shifts Overview"></div>';
      h+='<div class="fg" style="margin:0;flex:2;min-width:140px"><label class="fl">Link</label><input class="fi" id="lbl" type="url" placeholder="https://..."></div>';
      h+='<div class="fg" style="margin:0;flex:1;min-width:100px"><label class="fl">Category</label><select class="fs" id="lbc"><option>Six Shifts</option><option>Handouts</option><option>Assessments</option><option>Reading</option><option>Templates</option><option>General</option></select></div>';
      h+='<button class="btn bp" onclick="alb()">Add</button></div>';
      h+='<div class="fg" style="margin-top:8px;margin-bottom:0"><label class="fl">Description (optional)</label><input class="fi" id="lbd" placeholder="Brief description..."></div></div>';
      return h;
      }
      // ── ACTIONS ──
      // Client
      function sv(v){S.view=v;try{localStorage.setItem('sm_view',v);}catch(e){}R();}
      function rProfile(){
      var u=S.user,d=S.data;
      var h='<h2 style="font-family:\'DM Serif Display\',serif;font-size:24px;color:var(--green);margin-bottom:16px">Profile</h2>';
      h+='<div class="card">';
      if(u.photoURL)h+='<div style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:16px"><img src="'+u.photoURL+'" style="width:64px;height:64px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid var(--gold)"></div>';
      h+='<div class="fg"><label class="fl">Name</label><input class="fi" id="pname" type="text" value="'+e(d.displayName||u.displayName||'')+'"></div>';
      h+='<div class="fg"><label class="fl">Company</label><input class="fi" id="pcompany" type="text" value="'+e(d.company||'')+'"></div>';
      h+='<div class="fg"><label class="fl">Title / Role</label><input class="fi" id="ptitle" type="text" value="'+e(d.title||'')+'"></div>';
      h+='<div class="fg"><label class="fl">Phone</label><input class="fi" id="pphone" type="tel" value="'+e(d.phone||'')+'"></div>';
      h+='<div class="fg"><label class="fl">Address</label><input class="fi" id="paddress" type="text" value="'+e(d.address||'')+'"></div>';
      h+='<div class="fg"><label class="fl">Email</label><div style="font-size:14px;color:var(--text-muted);padding:10px 0">'+e(u.email)+'</div></div>';
      h+='<div style="margin-top:12px;text-align:right"><button class="btn bp" onclick="saveProfile()">Save Changes</button></div>';
      h+='</div>';
      return h;
      }
      function saveProfile(){
      var name=document.getElementById('pname').value.trim();
      if(!name){alert('Name is required');return;}
      var profile={
      displayName:name,
      company:document.getElementById('pcompany').value.trim(),
      title:document.getElementById('ptitle').value.trim(),
      phone:document.getElementById('pphone').value.trim(),
      address:document.getElementById('paddress').value.trim()
      };
      S.user.updateProfile({displayName:name}).then(function(){
      db.collection('users').doc(S.user.uid).set(profile,{merge:true});
      S.data.displayName=name;
      S.data.company=profile.company;
      S.data.title=profile.title;
      S.data.phone=profile.phone;
      S.data.address=profile.address;
      alert('Profile updated');
      R();
      });
      }
      function toggleMobNav(){var m=document.getElementById('mob-menu');if(m)m.style.display=m.style.display==='none'?'block':'none';}
      function closeMobNav(){var m=document.getElementById('mob-menu');if(m)m.style.display='none';}
      function th(id){var ts=dk(new Date());if(!S.data.completions[ts])S.data.completions[ts]=[];var a=S.data.completions[ts],i=a.indexOf(id);if(i===-1)a.push(id);else a.splice(i,1);save();R();}
      function thd(id,k){if(!S.data.completions[k])S.data.completions[k]=[];var a=S.data.completions[k],i=a.indexOf(id);if(i===-1)a.push(id);else a.splice(i,1);save();R();}
      function oam(){S.eh=null;_fdSel=[];S.mo=true;R();setTimeout(function(){var x=document.getElementById('hn');if(x)x.focus();},100);}
      function oem(id){S.eh=id;var hab=S.data.habits.find(function(x){return x.id===id;});_fdSel=hab&&hab.freqDays?hab.freqDays.slice():[];S.mo=true;R();}
      function cm(){S.mo=false;S.eh=null;R();}
      function cmo(ev){if(ev.target.classList.contains('modal-overlay'))cm();}
      function sh(){var n=document.getElementById('hn').value.trim(),d=document.getElementById('hd').value.trim(),c=document.getElementById('hcat').value,fr=document.getElementById('hfreq').value,fpw=parseInt(document.getElementById('hfpw').value)||1;if(!n)return;if(S.eh){var hb=S.data.habits.find(function(x){return x.id===S.eh;});if(hb){hb.name=n;hb.desc=d;hb.category=c;hb.freq=fr;hb.freqDays=_fdSel.slice();hb.freqPerWeek=fpw;}}else{S.data.habits.push({id:'h'+Date.now(),name:n,desc:d,category:c,freq:fr,freqDays:_fdSel.slice(),freqPerWeek:fpw});}save();cm();}
      function dh(id){if(!confirm('Remove this habit?'))return;S.data.habits=S.data.habits.filter(function(h){return h.id!==id;});save();R();}
      function tt(i){var t=S.data.todos||[];if(t[i]){t[i].done=!t[i].done;save();R();}}
      function catd(){var el=document.getElementById('ctd');if(!el)return;var t=el.value.trim();if(!t)return;S.data.todos=S.data.todos||[];S.data.todos.push({id:'t'+Date.now(),text:t,link:'',done:false});save();R();}
      function dtd(i){if(!confirm('Remove this to-do?'))return;S.data.todos=(S.data.todos||[]).slice();S.data.todos.splice(i,1);save();R();}
      function ssp(v){S.data.sessionPrep=v;save();}
      function openCal(){var url=(S.data.calendlyUrl||CAL);if(window.Calendly){window.Calendly.initPopupWidget({url:url+'?hide_gdpr_banner=1',prefill:{name:S.user.displayName||'',email:S.user.email||''}});}else{window.open(url,'_blank');}}
      function cag(){var t=document.getElementById('cgt').value.trim();if(!t)return;var o=document.getElementById('cgo').value.trim();S.data.goals=S.data.goals||[];S.data.goals.push({id:'g'+Date.now(),title:t,outcome:o,desc:'',status:'active',progress:0});save();R();}
      function ugp(gid,val){S.data.goals=(S.data.goals||[]);var g=S.data.goals.find(function(x){return x.id===gid;});if(g){g.progress=parseInt(val)||0;save();}}
      function cgst(gid,val){S.data.goals=(S.data.goals||[]);var g=S.data.goals.find(function(x){return x.id===gid;});if(g){g.status=val;save();R();}}
      function sn(k,v){if(!S.data.notes)S.data.notes={};S.data.notes[k]=v;save();}
      function dn(k){if(!confirm('Delete?'))return;delete S.data.notes[k];save();R();}
      // Coach
      function scv(v){S.cv=v;R();}
      function sel(i){var sorted=S.cls.slice().sort(function(a,b){var ai=ds(la(a))>=ID?0:1,bi=ds(la(b))>=ID?0:1;if(ai!==bi)return ai-bi;return(a.displayName||'').localeCompare(b.displayName||'');});S.sc=sorted[i];S.cv='detail';R();}
      function selByUid(uid){var c=S.cls.find(function(x){return x.uid===uid;});if(c){S.sc=c;S.cv='detail';R();}}
      function archClient(){if(!S.sc)return;var newVal=!S.sc.archived;if(!confirm(newVal?'Archive this client? They\'ll be hidden from the main list.':'Unarchive this client?'))return;scf(S.sc.uid,{archived:newVal});}
      function delClient(){if(!S.sc)return;if(!confirm('Permanently delete '+S.sc.displayName+'? This cannot be undone.'))return;if(!confirm('Are you sure? All data will be lost.'))return;db.collection('users').doc(S.sc.uid).delete().then(function(){S.cls=S.cls.filter(function(c){return c.uid!==S.sc.uid;});S.sc=null;S.cv='clients';R();});}
      function ref(){loadAll(function(){R();});}
      function scd(){scf(S.sc.uid,{startDate:document.getElementById('cs').value||null,endDate:document.getElementById('ce2').value||null});}
      function scnm(){var n=document.getElementById('cnm').value.trim();if(!n)return;scf(S.sc.uid,{displayName:n});}
      function scns(){scf(S.sc.uid,{nextSession:document.getElementById('cns').value||null});}
      function sccal(){scf(S.sc.uid,{calendlyUrl:document.getElementById('ccal').value.trim()||null});}
      function scfw(){scf(S.sc.uid,{focusOfWeek:document.getElementById('cfw').value||''});}
      function ag(){var t=document.getElementById('ngt').value.trim();if(!t)return;var o=document.getElementById('ngo').value.trim();var g=(S.sc.goals||[]).slice();g.push({id:'g'+Date.now(),title:t,outcome:o,desc:'',status:'active',progress:0});scf(S.sc.uid,{goals:g});}
      function rg(i){if(!confirm('Remove?'))return;var g=(S.sc.goals||[]).slice();g.splice(i,1);scf(S.sc.uid,{goals:g});}
      function sgst(i,v){var g=(S.sc.goals||[]).slice();if(g[i]){g[i].status=v;if(!g[i].history)g[i].history=[];g[i].history.push({status:v,date:new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]});}scf(S.sc.uid,{goals:g});}
      var NU='https://us-central1-scaling-minds-portal.cloudfunctions.net/sendNotification';
      function notify(type,data){if(!S.sc||!S.sc.email)return;fetch(NU,{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({to:S.sc.email,toName:S.sc.displayName||'',type:type,data:data})}).catch(function(err){console.error('Notify failed:',err);});}
      function asn(){var d=document.getElementById('snd').value,t=document.getElementById('snt').value.trim(),c=document.getElementById('snc').value.trim(),ex=document.getElementById('sne').value.trim(),n=document.getElementById('snn').value.trim();if(!d)return;var sn2=(S.sc.sessionNotes||[]).slice();sn2.push({id:'sn'+Date.now(),date:d,themes:t,commitments:c,experiments:ex,notes:n});scf(S.sc.uid,{sessionNotes:sn2});notify('session_note',{date:d,themes:t,commitments:c});}
      function rsn(i){if(!confirm('Remove?'))return;var sn2=(S.sc.sessionNotes||[]).slice();sn2.splice(i,1);scf(S.sc.uid,{sessionNotes:sn2});}
      function atd(){var t=document.getElementById('ntt').value.trim();if(!t)return;var l=document.getElementById('ntl').value.trim();var td=(S.sc.todos||[]).slice();td.push({id:'t'+Date.now(),text:t,link:l||'',done:false});scf(S.sc.uid,{todos:td});notify('todo',{text:t,link:l||''});}
      function rtd(i){if(!confirm('Remove?'))return;var td=(S.sc.todos||[]).slice();td.splice(i,1);scf(S.sc.uid,{todos:td});}
      function adc(){var t=document.getElementById('ndt').value.trim();if(!t)return;var l=document.getElementById('ndl').value.trim();if(!l)return;var c=document.getElementById('ndc').value;var d=(S.sc.docs||[]).slice();d.push({id:'d'+Date.now(),title:t,link:l,category:c||'General',desc:''});scf(S.sc.uid,{docs:d});notify('document',{title:t,desc:''});}
      function rdc(i){if(!confirm('Remove?'))return;var d=(S.sc.docs||[]).slice();d.splice(i,1);scf(S.sc.uid,{docs:d});}
      function alb(){var t=document.getElementById('lbt').value.trim();if(!t)return;var l=document.getElementById('lbl').value.trim();if(!l)return;var c=document.getElementById('lbc').value;var d=document.getElementById('lbd').value.trim();var lib=(S.lib||[]).slice();lib.push({id:'lb'+Date.now(),title:t,link:l,category:c||'General',desc:d||''});saveLib(lib);}
      function rlb(i){if(!confirm('Remove?'))return;var lib=(S.lib||[]).slice();lib.splice(i,1);saveLib(lib);}
      function eacsv(){var rows=[['Name','Email','Habits','Rate','Streak','Start','End','Last Active']];S.cls.forEach(function(c){rows.push([c.displayName,c.email,c.habits.length,crate(c)+'%',streak(c),c.startDate||'',c.endDate||'',la(c)||'Never']);});dlc(rows,'scaling-minds-all-clients.csv');}
      function eccsv(){var c=S.sc;if(!c)return;var td=new Date(),ad=Math.min(90,adays(c)),days=[];for(var i=ad-1;i>=0;i--){var d=new Date(td);d.setDate(d.getDate()-i);days.push(dk(d));}var hdr=['Date'];c.habits.forEach(function(h){hdr.push(h.name);});var rows=[hdr];days.forEach(function(k){var r=[k];c.habits.forEach(function(h){var co=c.completions[k]||[];r.push(co.indexOf(h.id)!==-1?'Yes':'');});rows.push(r);});dlc(rows,'scaling-minds-'+c.displayName.replace(/\s+/g,'-').toLowerCase()+'.csv');}
      function dlc(rows,fn){var csv=rows.map(function(r){return r.map(function(c){return'"'+String(c).replace(/"/g,'""')+'"';}).join(',');}).join('\n');var b=new Blob([csv],{type:'text/csv'});var u=URL.createObjectURL(b);var a=document.createElement('a');a.href=u;a.download=fn;a.click();URL.revokeObjectURL(u);}
      if('serviceWorker' in navigator){window.addEventListener('load',function(){navigator.serviceWorker.register('sw.js').catch(function(){});});}
      </script>
      </body>
      </html>

      Footer

      © 2026 GitHub, Inc.

      Footer navigation

      • Terms
      • Privacy
      • Security
      • Status
      • Community
      • Docs
      • Contact
      You can’t perform that action at this time.
